name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: early money…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Friends,

I know you’ve probably heard this spiel from me before, but as a frontline candidate, I know the importance of investing early in competitive districts all too well.

However, now that we’re a few months past the 2022 election, I thought I’d share this example of just how effective and important early investment can be.

As you may or may not already know, I am the first Democrat in 84 years, to hold my seat in New Jersey's 5th Congressional District. Winning in the NJ-5 district has been no easy feat, and 2022 was no exception. Despite redistricting, I still faced a huge disadvantage and became the fourth New Jersey Democrat on the “Frontline” program.

We knew my race would be tight – and on top of that, I had thousands of new constituents to meet across my district. But, in order to keep fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions in Congress, we knew we had to invest early.

Thanks to early investments from supporters like you, I was able to introduce myself to hundreds of new voters, and my team was able to get ads on TV and online months before my opponent – and keep them up through November’s election. Early investments gave me the resources necessary to win, and continue fighting for the people of NJ-5.

I don’t know for sure what my next election season will look like. But, I do know that investing early, like we did last year, will be critical. So, I hope you will consider chipping in $ to help launch my campaign and get us an early start! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]

Thank you for everything,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. name: BREAKING JAN. 6 UPDATE! (via VPP)
subject: January 6th Special Counsel receives *𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝-𝐧𝐞𝐰* evidence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Donald Trump’s goose is cooked
| **BREAKING: Trump’s Troubles mount as Special Counsel Gets New 2020 Evidence** | [**35,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5)
---
**FIRST:** Donald Trump REFUSED to accept Pres. Biden’s 2020 victory, and incited the deadly, treasonous January 6th attack on our Capitol.

**THEN:** The heroic January 6th Committee sprang into action to expose Trump and the MAGA mob’s vicious crimes and refer Trump for criminal prosecution.

**_NOW:_** Special Counsel Jack Smith has new damning evidence that could finally bring Trump to justice — _but he’s not going down without a fight!_ **The MAGA GOP has seized control of the House and wants to DESTROY all of the January 6th Committee’s hard work!** [**So we need 35,000 Democrats to sign our petition RIGHT NOW to urge the DOJ to prosecute Trump before it’s too late! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5) | [**35,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/prosecute-trump/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5)
---
**DEADLINE:_MIDNIGHT_ || GOAL: _35,000 SIGNATURES_**
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6178%2E878179%2Eour3H5)

**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5**

**[Activate My Membership](https://go.dscc.org/go/11457?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230127-MembershipActivation-FirstChance2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230127-MembershipActivation-FirstChance2023-Pros-sl1&akid=9531%2E9716520%2Ejguy0G)**
---

Team, we defended AND expanded our razor-thin Senate majority last year thanks to dedicated supporters like you who stood with President Biden and Vice President Harris from the very beginning.

But the next election is already on the horizon, and the experts say it’ll be even tougher. **If we want to defend our hard-won majority again, we NEED official Democratic Members to help lay the groundwork -- so we CAN'T start missing our membership goals right out of the gate!**

That’s why we’re offering our first 2023 Democratic Memberships **_exclusively_** to a group of our top supporters -- and YOU made the cut!

**[Let's PROVE that Democrats are ready to win. We need 46 more supporters in Pennsylvania to activate their memberships by midnight to reach our goal, so please act NOW before your exclusive invitation expires:](https://go.dscc.org/go/11457?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230127-MembershipActivation-FirstChance2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230127-MembershipActivation-FirstChance2023-Pros-sl1&akid=9531%2E9716520%2Ejguy0G)**

Team DSCC

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Watch Sues FBI
body:
STOP Big Tech Censorship!

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Lawsuit Forces Release of Records on Raid of Project
Veritas’s O’Keefe’s Home

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28781&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9OaEFJZ0pRbnc5OD9mZWF0dXJlPXNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
Journalist group, Project Veritas, investigates
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=26647&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJvamVjdHZlcml0YXMuY29tL2Fib3V0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
corruption and dishonesty in
public and private institutions. James O’Keefe is CEO and Chairman
of the Board.

He and the organization apparently stepped on some highly sensitive
toes in Washington, and Washington reacted with an abusive raid of his
home.

We received 11 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28768&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjY1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
of heavily redacted records from the U.S Department of Justice
concerning communications of _The New York Times_ to officials in the
U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York (SDNY),
showing the _Times_ was tipped off about the November 6, 2021
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28769&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvcHJvamVjdC12ZXJpdGFzLXJhaWQtb2tlZWZlLXN1Y2tlci1wdW5jaC1mcmVlLXByZXNzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
FBI raids on the homes of Project Veritas founder/CEO James O’Keefe
and then-Project Veritas journalists.

Seven pages of records are redacted in large part and three pages are
withheld entirely, which the agency claims are “not part of the
responsive record.”

The records were produced in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28770&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktY29tcGxhaW50LTAyNjUyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
we filed in September 2022 in the U.S. District Court for the District
of Columbia after the agency failed to respond to a March 29, 2022,
FOIA request (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28770&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktY29tcGxhaW50LTAyNjUyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
(No.1:22-cv-02652)).

Our lawsuit seeks all records of government and non-government
communications between officials in the U.S. Attorney’s Office in
the Southern District of New York and representatives of the _New York
Times_ regarding Project Veritas, James O’Keefe, Ashley Biden and
others.

The records reveal that the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern
District of New York was in contact with _New York Times_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28771&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8xMS8wNi91cy9wb2xpdGljcy9qYW1lcy1va2VlZmUtcHJvamVjdC12ZXJpdGFzLWFzaGxleS1iaWRlbi5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
reporters, including William K. Rashbaum (referred to in the email
chains as “Willy”) and Ben Protess, before, during, and after the
raids on the homes of O’Keefe and then-Project Veritas reporters.

The records include a November 4, 2021, email chain
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28772&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjY1Mi1wZ3MtNC03Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
labeled “Search in Mamaroneck re [redacted] diary?”, from James
Margolin, former Chief Public Information Officer of SDNY to Nicholas
Biase, former senior public affairs officer for SDNY, and an
individual whose name is redacted. Margolin states that “Willy”
from the _Times_ has information about the search warrants and
investigation seemingly about Ashley Biden’s diary
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28773&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYXNobGV5LWJpZGVuLWRvY3MtcG9saWNlL106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==

> Willy Rashbaum from the Times just called and says they know or
> believe that a search warrant is being conducted in Mamaroneck this
> morning at a location that is either the residence of Eric Cochrane
> (sp?) — who may or may not be a whistle-blower — or a Project
> Veritas office. He believes this is in connection with a Florida
> investigation into whether Project Veritas stole, or purchased a
> stolen, diary belonging to [redacted].
Margolin later includes redacted details about “two searches”
regarding the homes of James O’Keefe and then-Project Veritas
journalist Spencer Meads.

Margolin later states: “Times now believes it’s not ‘a Florida
investigation’ but an SDNY investigation, ‘and it involves more
than just the diary’ (no elaboration on that).”

In a November 6, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28774&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjY1Mi1wZ3MtOC0xMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
with the subject line ““Re: O’Keefe (arrest?)” from Margolin
to Biase and others, Margolin states, “The _Times_ hears O’Keefe
was arrested this morning.” The rest of the body of the email is
redacted as “not part of the responsive record.”

In response, Biase thanks Margolin and writes: “The Times has his
neighbor on record (who they suspect may not be entirely truthful)
saying that FBI were banging on O’Keefe’s door with guns (or at
least one agent with a gun) drawn.”

On November 24, 2021, Margolin emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61948&L=28775&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXVzLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNkbnktcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjY1Mi1wZ3MtMTItMTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
a redacted individual and Biase with the subject line “Veritas,”
stating that “Willy” (William K. Rashbaum of _Times_) informed
Margolin the _Times_ was doing another story about Project Veritas,
and “they’re pretty certain subpoenas went to [redacted].”
Margolin explains that Willy asked him for “a wave-off if” the
information was wrong, adding “I [Margolin] made no promises.”

Biase writes on November 30, 2021, in the heavily redacted email chain
that Biase had spoken with _NYT_ reporters “Willy” and Ben
Protess, and “neither mentioned it. Maybe Jim?” The rest of the
body of the email is redacted as “not part of the responsive
record.”

The _New York Times _was obviously tipped off about the unprecedented
raid on the home of James O’Keefe and other Project Veritas
journalists. And these new Justice Department records raise more
questions than answers about how that happened.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI OVER CENSORSHIP OF HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP STORY

The FBI has become a political enforcement arm of the Biden
Administration and the Biden family. We’re going to court to

clean_body: STOP Big Tech Censorship! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Lawsuit Forces Release of Records on Raid of Project Veritas’s O’Keefe’s Home [==] Journalist group, Project Veritas, investigates [=] corruption and dishonesty in public and private institutions. James O’Keefe is CEO and Chairman of the Board. He and the organization apparently stepped on some highly sensitive toes in Washington, and Washington reacted with an abusive raid of his home. We received 11 pages [] of heavily redacted records from the U.S Department of Justice concerning communications of The New York Times to officials in the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York (SDNY), showing the Times was tipped off about the November 6, 2021 [==], FBI raids on the homes of Project Veritas founder/CEO James O’Keefe and then-Project Veritas journalists. Seven pages of records are redacted in large part and three pages are withheld entirely, which the agency claims are “not part of the responsive record.” The records were produced in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [=] we filed in September 2022 in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the agency failed to respond to a March 29, 2022, FOIA request (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [=] (No.1:22-cv-02652)). Our lawsuit seeks all records of government and non-government communications between officials in the U.S. Attorney’s Office in the Southern District of New York and representatives of the New York Times regarding Project Veritas, James O’Keefe, Ashley Biden and others. The records reveal that the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York was in contact with New York Times [==] reporters, including William K. Rashbaum (referred to in the email chains as “Willy”) and Ben Protess, before, during, and after the raids on the homes of O’Keefe and then-Project Veritas reporters. The records include a November 4, 2021, email chain [=] labeled “Search in Mamaroneck re [redacted] diary?”, from James Margolin, former Chief Public Information Officer of SDNY to Nicholas Biase, former senior public affairs officer for SDNY, and an individual whose name is redacted. Margolin states that “Willy” from the Times has information about the search warrants and investigation seemingly about Ashley Biden’s diary [== Willy Rashbaum from the Times just called and says they know or believe that a search warrant is being conducted in Mamaroneck this morning at a location that is either the residence of Eric Cochrane (sp?) — who may or may not be a whistle-blower — or a Project Veritas office. He believes this is in connection with a Florida investigation into whether Project Veritas stole, or purchased a stolen, diary belonging to [redacted]. Margolin later includes redacted details about “two searches” regarding the homes of James O’Keefe and then-Project Veritas journalist Spencer Meads. Margolin later states: “Times now believes it’s not ‘a Florida investigation’ but an SDNY investigation, ‘and it involves more than just the diary’ (no elaboration on that).” In a November 6, 2021, email [] with the subject line ““Re: O’Keefe (arrest?)” from Margolin to Biase and others, Margolin states, “The Times hears O’Keefe was arrested this morning.” The rest of the body of the email is redacted as “not part of the responsive record.” In response, Biase thanks Margolin and writes: “The Times has his neighbor on record (who they suspect may not be entirely truthful) saying that FBI were banging on O’Keefe’s door with guns (or at least one agent with a gun) drawn.” On November 24, 2021, Margolin emails [==] a redacted individual and Biase with the subject line “Veritas,” stating that “Willy” (William K. Rashbaum of Times) informed Margolin the Times was doing another story about Project Veritas, and “they’re pretty certain subpoenas went to [redacted].” Margolin explains that Willy asked him for “a wave-off if” the information was wrong, adding “I [Margolin] made no promises.” Biase writes on November 30, 2021, in the heavily redacted email chain that Biase had spoken with NYT reporters “Willy” and Ben Protess, and “neither mentioned it. Maybe Jim?” The rest of the body of the email is redacted as “not part of the responsive record.” The New York Times was obviously tipped off about the unprecedented raid on the home of James O’Keefe and other Project Veritas journalists. And these new Justice Department records raise more questions than answers about how that happened. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI OVER CENSORSHIP OF HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP STORY The FBI has become a political enforcement arm of the Biden Administration and the Biden family. We’re going to court to interrupt the corruption. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the Justice Department for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [= (No. 1:23-cv-00079)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the FBI failed to respond fully to an August 28, 2022, FOIA request for: All alerts, notifications, advisories, foreign threat indicators, or similar records provided by any official or employee of the FBI to any officer or employee of Meta (formerly Facebook), Twitter, or any other social media company regarding the threat of disinformation disseminated by foreign actors related to any U.S. election. All records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI and any officer or employee of Meta, Twitter, or any other social media company regarding the laptop reportedly used by Hunter Biden, any news media reporting regarding the laptop and/or its contents, and/or the provenance of any information contained in any such reporting. In October 2020, in the run-up to the presidential election, the New York Post was able to confirm that Hunter Biden’s laptop [=], which was abandoned at a Delaware computer shop, contained embarrassing and possibly incriminating information about the Biden family. The Post’s story was censored by Twitter and other social media platforms despite its accuracy. Recent “Twitter files” released by Elon Musk show that FBI pressure [] on “Russian disinformation” led to the censorship: San Francisco FBI agent Elvis Chan “[sent] 10 documents to Twitter’s then-Head of Site Integrity, Yoel Roth, through Teleporter, a one-way communications channel from the FBI to Twitter,” the evening before the release of the Post story. Other “Twitter files” show the FBI pushed Twitter to also censor countless Twitter users who tweeted concerns (and jokes) about election integrity just before the 2020 election. The FBI was literally paying [==] Twitter to censor Americans just before the 2020 election! The FBI seems to have interfered in the 2020 election to help Joe Biden by encouraging Big Tech to censor Americans about the Hunter Biden laptop and other debates. And to add to the scandal, they are now covering up their misconduct. We have a comprehensive investigation and litigation project to expose and stop Big Government-Big Tech censorship. We sued [==] the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all records of communications between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA), a division of DHS, and the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online election content for censorship and suppression. In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored a Judicial Watch video about Biden corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [==], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and Judicial Watch’s YouTube account was suspended for a week. The video featured an interview with me. Judicial Watch continues to post it’s video [/it’s%20video] content on its Rumble channel (==). In April 2021, we published [=] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. In May 2021, we revealed [==] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies, Twitter and Facebook, to censor posts about the 2020 election. In July 2021, we uncovered [==] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. And, as you can see below, we’re just ramping up! JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR SURGEON GENERAL CONTACT WITH BIG TECH ABOUT VACCINES In the Biden administration’s zeal to push the COVID-19 vaccines, it turned it’s Surgeon General into an anti-constitutional tyrant. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for communications and records of the Surgeon General’s Communications Director’s contact with social media companies regarding COVID-19 vaccines (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [= (No. 1:23-cv-00113)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after HHS failed to respond adequately to a March 3, 2022, FOIA request for: All records, including, but not limited to, electronic mail, texts, memoranda, and handwritten notes, of, regarding, referring, or relating to any efforts of Alexandria Phillips, Communications Director, Office of the Surgeon General, to contact any employee of Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn, Tumblr, and Pinterest concerning COVID-19 vaccines. In 2021, the U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy issued a report titled “Confronting Health Misinformation [== to “slow the spread of health misinformation during the COVID-19 pandemic and beyond,” which called for censorship of speech about the vaccines and other COVID controversies: Prioritize early detection of misinformation “super-spreaders” and repeat offenders. Impose clear consequences for accounts that repeatedly violate platform policies. On March 3, 2022, Murthy demanded that the tech companies turn over information [==] about individuals who spread COVID-19 misinformation: In a formal notice, Murthy requested major tech platforms submit information about the prevalence and scale of COVID-19 misinformation on their sites, from social networks, search engines, crowdsourced platforms, e-commerce platforms and instant messaging systems. Biden’s Surgeon General is abusing his office to pressure Big Tech companies to censor Americans. This lawsuit aims to uncover the details of this government attack on the First Amendment. DHS RECALLS AIR MARSHALS ON MIGRANT WELFARE MISSIONS ALONG MEXICAN BORDER The Biden administration dishonestly refers to its border crisis as “a surge in irregular migration.” To cope with the mess it created, it began to pull Federal Air Marshals away from their basic duties. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest update [==] on the result of our pressure. Thanks to pressure from the Air Marshal National Council and Judicial Watch’s reporting, the Biden administration will stop sending Federal Air Marshals (FAM) to the Mexican border to provide illegal immigrants with welfare checks, transportation, and other basic services. The reckless practice left aircraft at risk by sending 150-200 FAM monthly to the southern border to help deal with “a surge in irregular migration.” Judicial Watch was the first to report [=] on the deployments in late October when the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) sent an electronic memorandum to the highly skilled law enforcement officers informing them of the assignments, which consisted of 21-day rotations that could be extended for up to 120 days. Judicial Watch obtained a copy of the directive from various recipients at the agency, which operates under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack. FAM are charged with protecting commercial passenger flights by deterring and countering the risk of terrorist activity, yet they were plucked from their duties to babysit illegal aliens. “The nation is experiencing a surge in irregular migration along the Southwest Border (SWB),” the October notice to FAM officers read. “The unprecedented volume of Noncitizen Migrants (NCMs) currently apprehended mandates immediate further action to protect the life and safety of federal personnel and noncitizens in CBP [Customs and Border Protection] custody.” The first wave of air marshals was dispatched to El Paso, Texas and Yuma, Arizona on October 30 for an October 31 start. Thirty officers and a supervisor went to El Paso, 15 officers and a supervisor to Yuma. Here is the important work that the specially trained law enforcement officers were doing on the southern border rather than their critical duty of protecting commercial planes flagged for terrorist threats. “Hospital Watch, Transportation, Law Enforcement Searches, Entry Control, Security at CBP Facilities and Welfare Checks.” In a formal complaint [=] to the DHS Inspector General, the Air Marshal National Council, which represents thousands of FAM nationwide, accused TSA Administrator David Pekoske and FAM Director Tirrell Stevenson of violating federal law and overstepping their authority by assigning air marshals to assist the U.S. Border Patrol with the illegal immigration crisis. The complaint also accused Homeland Security leaders of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority. Earlier this month when an intelligence alert disclosed that Al Qaeda is planning attacks in the U.S. involving planes, the Air Marshal National Council fired off a letter [= DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas as well as Pekoske and Stevenson reminding them that deploying FAM to the southern border to perform humanitarian work is reckless and putting the nation at extreme risk. Judicial Watch published a story [] about the threat after obtaining a copy from government sources of the intelligence alert, which was delivered on December 31, 2022, at 12:23:52 Greenwich Mean Time. The caption of the widely circulated warning reads: “Al-Qaeda says upcoming attacks on US, possibly involving planes, will use new techniques and tactics.” It appears that the combined efforts of Judicial Watch and the Air Marshal National Council have squeezed the Biden administration to end the controversial border missions. A memo dispersed to FAM just days ago says that all future deployments to the southwest border (SWB) have been suspended until further notice. “Wave #5 will continue their deployment until January 27th and then travel home as planned on January 28th,” according to the notice provided to Judicial Watch by various government sources. “Wave #6 will NOT DEPLOY as planned on January 25th.” The missive directs FAM to cancel travel and informs officers that hotel and car rental reservations will be cancelled by the agency. Air marshals nationwide are thrilled that they can return to their critical mission of securing the nation’s transportation system and David Londo, president of the Air Marshal National Council, said “it looks like we won.” Until next week... clean_body: In less than two weeks, Democrats have a chance to solidify our margins in the Pennsylvania House | | | | | In 10 DAYS, Democrats have a chance to solidify our margins in the Pennsylvania House, building our Democratic momentum with three more key victories in special elections. If we win, Democrats have a fighting chance at winning a majority in this chamber this year. If we lose, Republicans stand to gain ground, and they're itching to use these wins to further their extremist agenda – pushing dangerous abortion bans and barriers to the ballot box. Winning these three ultra-important races is critical for a Democratic majority in this chamber, so Republicans will be throwing everything they have into these elections and we need to be primed to fight back. We’re committed to putting in the work to compete in every last election we can. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like these in Pennsylvania is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | These races are some of the first crucial special elections of 2023 – but we’re anticipating over a dozen more. There are no “off-years” for state Democrats, so we’re counting on your support. Special elections are expensive and often come down to just a handful of votes – just a few weeks ago, we flipped a VA Senate seat by less than 700 votes – so every last dollar counts. There's no cavalry – the only people standing in the way of Republican special election victories are you and the people reading this email. And right now, with an urgent special election on the horizon and every dollar having 3x the impact, there's never been a better time to have a personal stake in this fight. name: House Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Schiff and Swalwell had to go. I will never apologize for protecting America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | **[House Speaker McCarthy rejects Jeffries' demand to reappoint Schiff, Swalwell to Intelligence Committee-- _FOX NEWS_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "House Speaker McCarthy rejects Jeffries' demand to reappoint Schiff, Swalwell to Intelligence
Committee — FOX NEWS")**
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---
Hi Peter,

When Nancy Pelosi took the unprecedented step of removing Republican members from their committee assignments, I vowed not to forget when House Republicans took back power.

So, when Eric Swalwell and Adam Schiff were nominated for the Intelligence Committee, I had no choice but to put America's security first and keep them off the committee.

_**If you support this decision will you have the courage to stand with me right now?**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---
But make no mistake, Peter, this move does not come without risks.

**[The mainstream media is already coming to their defense and viciously attacking me for protecting America's security. That's why I'm asking you to chip in right now and stand with me against these attacks from the Radical Left](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "The mainstream
media is already coming to their defense and viciously attacking me for protecting America’s security. That’s why I’m asking you to
chip in right now and stand with me against these attacks from the Radical Left")**

_The Democrats and their media allies are already attacking me and making excuses for these corrupt members,**but here are the facts:** _
1. **Eric Swalwell** had a relationship with a Chinese spy and put America's secrets at risk.
2. **Adam Schiff** used his position of power to lie to the American people and delegitimize elections.

The mainstream media can attack me all they want, but my promise to you is that with Republicans in charge, America's security will always come first.

I'm not backing down from this fight, and I know you won't either.

**[So please, chip in now and support me as I fight back against these outrageous attacks and work to protect America from our adversaries.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "So please,
chip in now and support me as I fight back against these outrageous attacks and work to protect America from our adversaries. ")**
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---
For America,

Kevin McCarthy

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259085:J_uYLHGNQ:m:1:3334294963:25BE3AAE22E7F5EACC09A8CBE5DB80AD:r)

subject: Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last
body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core.**As a fellow conservative American, you simply cannot afford to ignore what’s happening to our country.** [**That’s why I’m offering you a copy of my explosive new book that exposes the far-left’s evil plot – _FINAL BATTLE: the Next Election Could be the Last._**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zho8i11t5bb6te6hqolenj8ju2pfbjpqbd341970_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cth2bs)
---
| | This is a can’t-miss deal that I pray you take advantage of today.My name is David Horowitz. I wrote **_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ **because I’m committed to ending the reign of far-left Marxist elites._Why?_ Well, 50 years ago... I _was_ a Marxist.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeedbiheq85ppqluebo6onlmhfm0c9b5d4k2bapo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cth2bs)
---
| | I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible.** So, I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, _we would lose our country forever._**And now, I published this book because Americans must wake up and realize just how close our nation is to succumbing to the far-left’s Socialist plot.** [**Claim your copy of _FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ HERE.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhutqgi4rmqq06a49jn8mpv4clq2n55hf8uo03i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cth2bs)This book exposes the REAL truth that every American must hear. But don’t just take it from me. Take it from these raving critic reviews:
---
| |
---
| **"David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."**** **
---
**\-- Dinesh D’Souza**
---
**New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**
---
| |
---
| **_"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”**
---
**\-- Dennis Prager**
---
**Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | My friend, I hold NOTHING back in this latest release – which is why I want you to have a copy of it today. I want you to see, in detail, the shocking revelations I found about:
---
| |
* The un-twisted story of January 6th.
* How “systemic racism” is a curated LIE.
* The illegal immigration numbers leftists have been desperately hiding from you.
* And proof that leftists are illegally manipulating our elections.

---
| | I hope you agree with me when I say that you cannot afford to leave this book unread.That’s why I’m pleased to offer you this book today.[**All you need to do to jump on this exclusive, first-come-first-serve offer is to give a generous tax-deductible donation to my Freedom Center of $35 or more.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvsq5mogkhhmnbiuvf1pad9ropnthj7o6rueccd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cth2bs) That’s it – as my most sincere thanks for supporting my work and my Freedom Center, I will send you a copy of my new book that leftists _already_ want to ban.The David Horowitz Freedom Center is supported entirely by patriotic Americans like you who want to help us expose the truth about the far-left and save our country from utter destruction. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr40pddf16eq950prvrqpi02qj9ejoa33s5bef3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqaphgvqd467hfi33076tk8bhuskmsu8dm54fl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqa41bhpoqs2bm617auao7b38gr4eieonmukc6k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zma8ds5muflapgkdvd09evhmgafe097sjnmapvq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbcfa4vfcqko63ed78vqdmt54sha3jcmsudpfk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za1iqqscddnqqqvllhhbgtlgec32a5ftfaphoso8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor6c5h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdns48v4ipshu099913d55ut1qs098f1eo15rlk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor6c5h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmt7dfiob7adh86l3uq0ara7khm2v5v6locgojt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor6c5h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zblca49je5737tplnqd8db8b4pam5b3irih811k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpktgcrcq5ftukjti7nbbg80o2jh80et9j6o6spo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1475d4p0irsoj3d4ce45ud0b3iqlc15fdnfaop0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zce5u02pscrfaop7rn1kuhrfvcb9vneo2nbbdmd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgd7cdl7sgjtjbjn503cu4hq997cfos09jiibtmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvkbhjf6qkqd44dkpanvpq032v8h7c1hsce4593o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcuib993nq0liv25qonqcf87bbmgn5fciq4bfhe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cjh2bs)

Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick Finally... a Mini Solar Generator that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone! Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE. You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe Fast Recharge Long-Lasting Battery Recharge 2,000 Times! Easy to Use Completely Portable & Easy to Use! Powers Your Favorite Devices FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included and more! That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: "I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!" Craig W. Police Officer | | Rita L. This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. ---|--- | Steve G. Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. ---|--- | Thomas B. Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. ---|--- | Jana H. Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. ---|--- | Allan D. Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! ---|--- | Chris S. Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! ---|--- | Richard B. Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! ---|--- | Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

|

Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7i5bkg9i101m8vhl36a47289d2nle8264f52rro_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjoje98kodgjkni3tumjc5eoliko74fn8t35udeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo3pgl3ipqb2onevninpgcrdt7qekirlc79fgdd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7i0op19nbv9p8beba2c739buds2hiq92irtfjtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2tutaptvvcmtkc231vpgcpj4b0ik6i15b1euhfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4dica3nh6pc1bak2m91og4k5ipnr8hk533bqp28_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6cor2cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below? Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now. Let elected officials know loud and clear that you demand an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below: Thank you, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development P.S. name: American Update
subject: What happened to my country?
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0440%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=eL2ch5r9pzOKkpVWkKU9fQ&sysid=1)

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657045%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RG5yU3XWnvgmRTYeIG0FVQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, “**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**.”

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657046%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=54YCOa6VwgRRO6eBHtvs8A&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0440%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=eL2ch5r9pzOKkpVWkKU9fQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0440%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=eL2ch5r9pzOKkpVWkKU9fQ&sysid=1)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Are universities getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z15h8iss0pk8ahhq7a9lkm83829k6155djjnao98_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4c3h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z79vtntd851p5oci0hrf437rt99ed40rh13psgog_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4c3h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvof45f6vdidcfhpoq1ktqul6g4gdktp5stvrbrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4c3h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
“What happened to my country?” It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh5g4sik3gml82pffkfqipb13s1k5f78jvddapn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoarcqqbnejdm3j1pi9tjh8l8j8mhoe9latg5qco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4cjh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkjc6bpprcmfeba619tqqqhfsilbavukvjbqjb7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjg6eoj4cjh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657040%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XBAyQJozEjCClxf%2fwJGnKQ&sysid=1)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657041%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o1Z2VJENwB37EANOlKA80g&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657049%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FOzLanJcNPLQ%2fNhNcRsQnA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657042%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P7VMBE0E8QDGoPJzV6bzhQ&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GOfzeOKjkal2K4dONScxUw&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657044%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R9JgSFQKTC65WsHzoOMd1g&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Shift WA
subject: UPDATE: Supreme Court finally hears state income tax case
body:
Here's what happened in Court yesterday: During oral arguments, State Solicitor General Noah Purcell continued to push the Democrats' partisan claim that the new tax is not on income, but is actually an excise tax. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435484:WDoCwVDN8:m:1:2610672541:6DEAF1415A0E3D90CD6190CD5475B3F3:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

In their latest attempt to pass a state income tax, Democrats presented arguments in defense of their capital gains income tax before the Washington State Supreme Court yesterday.

As a brief background, Democrat lawmakers passed a state income tax on capital gains in 2021. Jay Inslee then signed his income tax into law.

Last year, Douglas County Superior Court Judge Brian Huber stuck down the tax as unconstitutional. He ruled that the tax is "properly characterized as an income tax" and not "an excise tax as argued by the State." Therefore, the tax is not permitted under the state constitution.

Not to be deterred after decades of his party's never-ending efforts to impose a state income tax on the people of Washington, Democrat State Attorney General Bob Ferguson appealed the decision directly to the State Supreme Court.

During oral arguments, State Solicitor General Noah Purcell continued to push the Democrats' partisan claim that the new tax is not on income, but is actually an excise tax. He said that if "a person generates income by engaging in a transaction does not mean that a tax on that transaction becomes an income tax or a property tax."

Former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna instead referred the justices to the definition used by all taxing authorities in the United States, including every other state and the IRS. Under these authorities, capital gains are income and taxes on those earnings is an income tax.

It's unclear - based on the reaction and the questions asked by the Justices - which way the ruling will go. What is clear that you cannot count on mainstream media outlets to give you unbiased coverage of an issue they agree with the Democrats on. **But you can count on us.**

Our efforts depend entirely on the regular contributions of everyday Washingtonians like you. **[Will you help us by donating $25, $50, or $100 today so we can stay in the fight?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435485:WDoCwVDN8:m:1:2610672541:6DEAF1415A0E3D90CD6190CD5475B3F3:r)**

[**The end of the month is approaching, and we need to meet our fundraising goal so we can keep our eyes on what the Democrats are doing. Consider helping our efforts today.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435485:WDoCwVDN8:m:1:2610672541:6DEAF1415A0E3D90CD6190CD5475B3F3:r)

Thank you for your continued support,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435486:WDoCwVDN8:m:1:2610672541:6DEAF1415A0E3D90CD6190CD5475B3F3:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14123813&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWDoCwVDN8).
---

What is clear that you cannot count on mainstream media outlets to give you unbiased coverage of an issue they agree with the Democrats on. But you can count on us. Our efforts depend entirely on the regular contributions of everyday Washingtonians like you. Thank you for your continued support, The Shift WA team | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington.
