name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
This issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7836%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=54vkKdZ4D%2f6rsOkDYHGhJw&sysid=1)

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93341%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jab9tw0ozD3tOg4g%2bZBsUA&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kYG42RdofjAxa7G4EXVTHg&sysid=1)**

It’s critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media’s deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation’s history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump’s term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden’s immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden’s “policies” have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kYG42RdofjAxa7G4EXVTHg&sysid=1)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden’s open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kYG42RdofjAxa7G4EXVTHg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93343%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4dhCylGNyTGOUzYdcb3tOQ&sysid=1)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: 9 Crazy Examples of Government Waste in 2022
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259087:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)

Peter,

Sometimes the government's actions don't make sense from a financial or common sense perspective.

My name is Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). It is FEE's vision to make the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the rising generation.

So here are nine of the craziest ways the government wasted taxpayer dollars in 2022.
1. $140 million of COVID relief funds to construct an 800-room luxury hotel

2. $31.5 million stolen from COVID relief funds to purchase luxury cars

3. $28 million on camouflage uniforms for use in Afghanistan, which didn't even match the environment.

4. $1.7 billion to maintain 77,000 empty Federal buildings

5. $70 million to help subsidize the "free" New York Staten Island Ferry

6. $50 million in US taxpayer dollars to boost Tunisia's $1 billion travel sector during COVID-19

7. $2.3 million to inject 6-month-old beagle puppies with cocaine

8. $3 million to construct a Gandhi museum in Houston

And last but certainly not least,

9. $118,971 for research to study if Thanos (a movie villain) could snap his fingers wearing the Infinity Gauntlet.

I don't know about you, but I've never wanted to spend as much as $1 on anything from that list. And I worry it will continue unless we do something about it.

That's why FEE is building up the next generation through FEE in the Classroom, a program that goes into schools and teaches the ideas of liberty, economics, free markets, and history.

FEE in the Classroom is on a mission to teach 65,000 students before the end of the year. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of January.

[_**Can you help FEE bring economic education to more students? Please click here to donate any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259087:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

_**This program uniquely challenges high school students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

This includes topics such as:
* Individual liberty
* Free markets
* Entrepreneurship
* Private property
* High moral character
* Limited government

These subjects are extremely important in our everyday lives, but the Radical Left doesn't want our students to learn them.

Once you arm a generation with economic education, they start to question the billions of dollars in wasteful spending.

Can you help FEE reach our goal of connecting with and educating 65,000 students this year? Click any link below to send in your urgent donation and help us reach our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of January.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259088:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259090:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259091:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259092:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259093:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259094:JD7crHGN_:m:1:3334294963:8FAA5EE5BBF0B95874D6BF64D3A601F9:r)

President Emeritus

subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through.
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlvlgm5t8vua2cqqlmob7na2rjadpr6v9rimrnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji60o76cjh2bs)**. The free video:
* Gives you six simple steps you can take immediately to find safety in an unsafe world ...
* Names the land-mine stocks to dump with urgency ...

* Guides you to special kinds of trades that have a consistent track record of unusual success precisely when nearly everything else is crashing -- they're called Crash Profit Trades, and, as you'll see, there are many to choose from.

**[Click here](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlu542hjts5oa1e43v4pb6jnel5esl69ba76rtj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji60o76cjh2bs)** to watch this urgent briefing now. subject: Putting them on trial
body:

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqr0sdgcjk8c4a6nafg5t4utq5vddpconqa4tj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji68pr4c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlj38fs1sc1pbjinkj4u42qothe0a2vilduj9th8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji68pr4c9h2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvujs1c16fadjkqv14i9vsoq0u4ki9ns0gb1172g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji68pr4c9h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2tg16kc80g4qiraov8riojs1dbmdhi3vungd20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji68pr4c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3ce1c4vq6fnr3ceogofdmd7lqgjsopvlk20eog_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji68pr4c9h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through.
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zljkvle9p0819umoa7criqou43mjfovgblcmmdfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob1cph2bs)**. The free video:
* Gives you six simple steps you can take immediately to find safety in an unsafe world ...
* Names the land-mine stocks to dump with urgency ...
* Gives you immediate guidance on what kind of assets to buy to protect your stock portfolio and protect your real estate portfolio ...
* Guides you to special kinds of trades that have a consistent track record of unusual success precisely when nearly everything else is crashing -- they're called Crash Profit Trades, and, as you'll see, there are many to choose from.

**[Click here](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqvaurq5vq6b4vjqe695v9rhqepguu0hs877050g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob1cph2bs)** to watch this urgent briefing now. If you own a home, have a portfolio of investment properties or rental units ... it's critical you take action now. Watch Dr. Weiss' video immediately, before the bottom truly falls out of this market. **[Watch the free video now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk41sb8i84mcr1cgftefrgqd752ep8ndm7tcgduo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob1cph2bs)** Sincerely, |

name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7837%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=XsUDpFMzzWrunwTUqwhDMw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93456%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WuSUDRly8DUxg5ZK35JpWA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93457%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hgsba3oXWzYGy57feIAlDg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93457%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hgsba3oXWzYGy57feIAlDg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7837%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=XsUDpFMzzWrunwTUqwhDMw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7837%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=XsUDpFMzzWrunwTUqwhDMw&sysid=1)

name: David Trone
subject: Our office address has changed — but our commitment hasn’t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
www.davidtrone.com [www.davidtrone.com]
Peter,
With the 118th Congress in full swing, my team and I are hard at work advocating for you and making a difference for all Marylanders. We’re making real progress on improving access to mental health treatment, combating opioid addiction, reforming our criminal justice system, and much more. But our number one priority remains serving YOU and your needs.
I wanted to let you know of some changes in our contact information so that you can keep in touch with me and my team when you need us.
Our new office address is:
30 W Patrick St., Suite 505, Frederick, MD 21701
301-926-0300 • Hours: Monday - Friday, 9am-5pm
While our office address has changed, our commitment to you hasn’t. My team and I will work tirelessly to help you navigate issues with the federal government and help you get access to the benefits you’re entitled to. Each year, we help thousands of Marylanders solve problems with Social Security, veterans benefits, immigration, unemployment, and more. If we can be of any assistance, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. We are here to help!
I look forward to connecting with you over the coming weeks and months with updates on my work in Washington. Thank you, as always, for your continued support. It is a privilege to serve you.
Sincerely,
David
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zas51cbf3f0or5qbufi1omhf5epqrgjn19recj18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zljlrh7nl7ovkpuotr2hgg7l26fmt56biuvraj0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl6v9q4lsmvgdrbvgrsdi5tnqk2lssueoq07cde8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm385hqujfjcjeo2n1a82fvjc8bn3bsfd4rvtlp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpsmmilduge5mseukb7rvma5j7j18gubtc7aqqk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z197h1kjume6h55pdc6ra60h0ovrugr5j3skb1ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb23u57p6ueg3nkp59l2qjd05ji5g9q7pv1jbl2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5h9d8esgom9rfa3m2qnu191hekl1mjupk3v71kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji62ob6c3h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoj5a9u9ij8bit562sc51g9hofr40km09mo9q4d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji66oj3cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpta6b2ltq1vs8jl1dsbf5cd6j90qp7vubl3bfb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji66oj3cth2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfsjhsvpiqkrpfmfkqtrs3r44u1r6ivo0dr97h6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji66oj3cth2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zim8vhq08vffl66pj4qbp9rjvl01pcqud8eop950_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji66oj3cth2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znlm2hg9savqakk13jl103msvrc2lrmu85rjrt60_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji66oj3cth2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention. Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below? Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now. Let elected officials know loud and clear that you demand an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below: Thank you, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development P.S. We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries... and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259086:J4z0rHGoN:m:1:3331421248:A66003BC0F3A756A57E6290DBCD682AA:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259086:J4z0rHGoN:m:1:3331421248:A66003BC0F3A756A57E6290DBCD682AA:r) Dear Peter,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259086:J4z0rHGoN:m:1:3331421248:A66003BC0F3A756A57E6290DBCD682AA:r)

His name is John D. Andries... and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives... that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults... Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities... but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259086:J4z0rHGoN:m:1:3331421248:A66003BC0F3A756A57E6290DBCD682AA:r)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Peter, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259086:J4z0rHGoN:m:1:3331421248:A66003BC0F3A756A57E6290DBCD682AA:r)

| | | | | Peter, **_GOOD NEWS:_ We can shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH!!** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's less than a month away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e60a8e8ae843b5a79f57ffd3d61d3e&_e=Aj9OOAJoFBJ_WSWzbKNjHWz6gpOBFPoCIicxuwE8mqMygk5CMAZ8SERWml5KlrkizLoa544S__DWtSStQZQgQrTpZZw2uqhDzBkr2Z9YGfeCeVZcUtecUQGS-AkRInPLR3AjkmIXdBxajm6YDdmvKR2hoO80ynIVtE6IqC2gIHqAXxOhtYw0Z4jCqx22xxXak5lrZqY8B347I36HDWUr9rWWH4E-0fiEJV1v7LXTEwjJlFTIh3AGLWrCI2WsEOnmrcNTDvHl537zoH9RQJQ1PMtOTfyNSMIj7ZMnjDbI3cA%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e60a8e8ae843b5a79f57ffd3d61d3e&_e=Aj9OOAJoFBJ_WSWzbKNjHWz6gpOBFPoCIicxuwE8mqMygk5CMAZ8SERWml5KlrkizLoa544S__DWtSStQZQgQrTpZZw2uqhDzBkr2Z9YGfeCeVZcUtecUQGS-AkRInPLR3AjkmIXdBxajm6YDdmvKZ7vnmwgZWN5J4UuCQwdn0YpxEXcfGG1tOf-z-gBRsupqIE08ATelxWLC2AmnYc1fJeqLPdgWGf32IWaWPAcSgssJMp3FCMaw-DDC-bzjNBGECgPyT-3UDxXwkQ00JRWSCtnPwDhVqesn_cpwara7SU%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e60a8e8ae843b5a79f57ffd3d61d3e&_e=Aj9OOAJoFBJ_WSWzbKNjHWz6gpOBFPoCIicxuwE8mqMygk5CMAZ8SERWml5KlrkizLoa544S__DWtSStQZQgQrTpZZw2uqhDzBkr2Z9YGfeCeVZcUtecUQGS-AkRInPLR3AjkmIXdBxajm6YDdmvKYDBUEhFEiHqX7E58X4YghyZwxNgROpsMLbkVF9eMWnWI1ZX9yDSvn6c35ApZIUFZdlbzn9cI3i53lqv_XiWvb4qb93on6K762CherW5h0qEQOyj9Fdxt7U-NaTQcLkQT8q4pBYLJFqyvfQmN5qUelw%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e60a8e8ae843b5a79f57ffd3d61d3e&_e=Aj9OOAJoFBJ_WSWzbKNjHWz6gpOBFPoCIicxuwE8mqMygk5CMAZ8SERWml5KlrkizLoa544S__DWtSStQZQgQrTpZZw2uqhDzBkr2Z9YGfeCeVZcUtecUQGS-AkRInPLR3AjkmIXdBxajm6YDdmvKVoOY6Kmb_NTGSEhocWwcbMyKVwvt3x92BWH14wixnj-RIEGRTjAibbYT5HcPeTlK0ewWltu7ZtJJoOU335UfWE_4eiynmbnu1rVGYsjxX1Q_WQjO7IDWdu3C89tnIZ9rwq4lWC9WxA2rY0JLYTb2J4%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? name: 1600 Daily
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd4c6in0dppkjrvkujepsn457um5qo9fm57bh1f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjh68or1cjh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5hq4n4o2om49vt8p6agrshu7gglp9tkuu0v7hsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjh68or1cjh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmc9vamo98dp084gr097pul5st6co2nsd6n48lu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjh68or1cjh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkco9u361cajittqfol71e04475dja7b1itol2b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji69o71clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znkc0njjbsnep7ik96jl3l4bgimvalhptq1knqbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cji69o71clh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78718%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LJwHSi1l%2fVE0w%2bQz3NX7Qg&sysid=1) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78719%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hpU5bFW7n%2fa5UPlnQqwU4w&sysid=1) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. * Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jD6ltSxtLM9gxgq0CyjPcg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78718%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LJwHSi1l%2fVE0w%2bQz3NX7Qg&sysid=1) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78712%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hZGN0cEF2%2b7q4%2fI5%2fQkhyQ&sysid=1) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a 20230128 we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78712%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hZGN0cEF2%2b7q4%2fI5%2fQkhyQ&sysid=1)

A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af57303af90646d29906ec5eba149c98&_e=u4t_vzp8iH1_lTLIn2cTJj7ffhpVVOR5rB-_EFZOpQXr_Z-2DoGBlgoDKwfxSAjWC4riDFffXpuUlmGamk3GToFPBLDQ0Dr9KuS9Nd5--Py26Ltfx3SIdAU12zhLzmV3NoAbBtl2WhvSwS3IUtDso1P5cBBKj9IS_hDgH6pCyChg3e2XrFKYIPgEYz_RNawzz3fWYFY-e7qLBm4idxJmOJxUp5W9G0Ez3RYXs8hxySximsAPoLZIwvr2GDWAWmmjigm9KRbjuIaXYElwtkev1Sic0RcEBTD-Lw0_5mKDBUffrWsxunXgsJjvw_DlDNBm)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af57303af90646d29906ec5eba149c98&_e=u4t_vzp8iH1_lTLIn2cTJj7ffhpVVOR5rB-_EFZOpQXr_Z-2DoGBlgoDKwfxSAjWC4riDFffXpuUlmGamk3GToFPBLDQ0Dr9KuS9Nd5--Py26Ltfx3SIdAU12zhLzmV3NoAbBtl2WhvSwS3IUtDso6MG1CF5IV3rwJtLFhBA91AxYBRaKlmiBbIdj-khLalcOCT38go-wnqkD5Iq38Fti5RReqlG4vq6KvIsEjb1P3xhT2l14rtWSFPKAXSTXTRGWmTrkfN2VwlvykTqHFrFT_YL4BF3ZM4tihxmT8P5oA9icWUfZu-sLmD1r9Qxdys0)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af57303af90646d29906ec5eba149c98&_e=u4t_vzp8iH1_lTLIn2cTJj7ffhpVVOR5rB-_EFZOpQXr_Z-2DoGBlgoDKwfxSAjWC4riDFffXpuUlmGamk3GToFPBLDQ0Dr9KuS9Nd5--Py26Ltfx3SIdAU12zhLzmV3NoAbBtl2WhvSwS3IUtDso9G_NLFpaAVum3eJz_w3_l468bNUTUCY8Bi24alVHhbsHHeWmJX6mD9u775RttzxxohkljOWYTzDOI8cnItRiTbMd98umF6GCD9JM59VyEIasaP3nNYJuY9QfPyPR0MA8kUZMau0LcUPj9t-GEP3sAKj75iBURrmzJCYe3mZfSCc) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-McGjyqGH2YSkidOsw)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works, and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://trk.libertyledger.)[NO](http://trk.libertyledger.)For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:

* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 6.2 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

****[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.libertyledger.)****
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDI4LTYxODFlNWQ5YWUxOTQyODY4ODYyNjIyY2ZjZjU3ZWQzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/l97xi-4ouJAACeJY93d4yw) to unsubscribe.

Peter, Biden's presidency is one failure after another.
* He shut down American energy independence and now we're paying more at the pump.
* Between runaway spending and supply chain issues, he's created the worst inflation we’ve seen in 40 years!
* His open borders policies have led to a record number of illegal border crossings, sacrificing American safety and security. It's the worst border crisis we've ever seen and Americans are calling for Secretary Mayorkas to be impeached.
* He's letting the WOKE Left run rampant with an ESG agenda across America.

_And what's he have to offer this week? More plans for radical spending._ **This is everything we're up against, Peter. And it’s everything we need to be prepared to DEFEAT. ** That’s why we need you NOW. Our critical end-of-month deadline in January is coming up soon and we're short just $9,723 of reaching our fundraising goals. And we’re not done standing tall. _We are not backing down_. Across America, people are waking up to Biden’s failed agenda. Our nation is at an inflection point. Let’s keep up the pressure on our new Republican Congress, and make sure they are listening to _“we the people.”_
_We can’t do it without you._**__[SUPPORT HERITAGE ACTION NOW>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c0ba309f3fda445a8ecc6640de6ca11d&_e=bOW6tVAi4RX-iW-BPznSm8uIqSNe8GZwjTCTm9ChnKh_IwaRPbilJmA6GC2GyMgM6X3rSk4KCXGneX-8IsKfcfwwZ7J4L0Qe9hUIUNUpAcxUUel1pu0E9Zpc37-PZWnuuo6abHdKSLR_tbgi0grwH9jxtvcJE5fbiC6zrncauEQ4XmhRGHZf-tiu3rX3mjRoFHGGYDkNOJtuA5HHCxK6Rb2ew_HGDMslgwixfp5uaC5dlLTk2Jqr_XxT5CWF_K-yYNau6XjNo_IuhXzNX2qu3C_RDlB5RYeeZ_3MHH8PS27ov2Imqo7tnwNt2R7G-jLcd0aLG9QfUZSrmQM85CGLzgOPgYI1KRGofyRvwFJlpx8%3D)_ _** Our activists on the ground in battleground states rely on your support as they defend our values, protect our communities, restore parental rights, and demand transparency in our electoral system so we know each legal vote counts this November. Our schools. Our sovereignty. Our voting rights. It all comes down to the work we do together. And we just can’t afford to come up short. **Please, contribute today to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal now:_[https://heritageaction.com/save_america_now](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c0ba309f3fda445a8ecc6640de6ca11d&_e=bOW6tVAi4RX-iW-BPznSm8uIqSNe8GZwjTCTm9ChnKh_IwaRPbilJmA6GC2GyMgM6X3rSk4KCXGneX-8IsKfcfwwZ7J4L0Qe9hUIUNUpAcxUUel1pu0E9Zpc37-PZWnuuo6abHdKSLR_tbgi0grwH9jxtvcJE5fbiC6zrncauEQ4XmhRGHZf-tiu3rX3mjRoFHGGYDkNOJtuA5HHCxK6RSrKwOK2Bc7EHWPK5Gl8UWfVRJ_o1Wx9c2zcfR-4lkgrqrga2ecm32Xbgn4qWdA5afnXXygrB161dSlYbYboxgHSawA0qDMSEf3ubv7MGoXHOHMarufKHB5pHioJj8qqDISQU5T1-i5DNCi-s-I8LfM%3D)_** _Your support means a lot to us._ Thank you, Jessica AndersonExecutive Director, Heritage Action for America

| | Derek, The Senate is back in full swing this week — so while we prepare for the January fundraising deadline, we wanted to take a moment to ask about your priorities for this session of Congress. **[_Take the survey now before our big January 31 fundraising deadline._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57917122/389519352/-1503823210?refcode=mw_em_230128_1&ms=mw_em_230128_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDVkNzAzMy0yZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mlf2LR5Cc96DgymLkuRlaaIagRvpEyejqTURMeZvWRc=&emci=22eae668-7f9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8d5d7033-2d9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)** With a Republican House and a Democratic Senate, we’re in for a lot of big fights ahead this year in Washington. That’s why Senator Warner wants to know your priorities for this session of Congress. In order to be your voice in the Senate, he needs to understand what’s most important to you right now. Do you want to see Congress pass legislation around voting rights? Do you want to protect reproductive freedom in the Commonwealth? Do you want to push back on the House GOP’s far-right agenda? Is something else at the top of your list? name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a275384745364a41a6ea8f4923b07760&_e=ZrnbCKPAVam0v6gC9iU8iwP7rlGOKbPqe9Oqc8o_AV-c9gmpN00W3uMTxZbIvlJr3MygEKnwRuwLVFXSnBTjVFeJP1tJpyxFqO5zSsaFZcqtcv12avNx6MOg5R5V1YLW9WuQEUlT7KRvBtQe-vcy0fR3tDdIZRzxH6ziS4mRA0N1Cnlc_AYz8Vrd1O7Piw9ZP9iRgWmrWnORqRNGuEt5zMKlE078h-z5SE3EifyVqrEhuQJ80V_Yz3d3_vfWv4OU_OnXMwobUWM3WwSKVxBOUk3mqtAKTOVkyb3I0ETEaco%3D)**. The free video:
* Gives you six simple steps you can take immediately to find safety in an unsafe world ...
* Names the land-mine stocks to dump with urgency ...
* Gives you immediate guidance on what kind of assets to buy to protect your stock portfolio and protect your real estate portfolio ...
* Guides you to special kinds of trades that have a consistent track record of unusual success precisely when nearly everything else is crashing -- they're called Crash Profit Trades, and, as you'll see, there are many to choose from.

**[Click here](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a275384745364a41a6ea8f4923b07760&_e=ZrnbCKPAVam0v6gC9iU8iwP7rlGOKbPqe9Oqc8o_AV-c9gmpN00W3uMTxZbIvlJr3MygEKnwRuwLVFXSnBTjVFeJP1tJpyxFqO5zSsaFZcqtcv12avNx6MOg5R5V1YLW9WuQEUlT7KRvBtQe-vcy0WmRw8oieBO7_jnJheQZIfjsd8X2_SYNRlGXNfjZ5BGzH9wYylSqpROo5rCvG208ceT8YtXLQLB5Jv_fL-0w6CWH0cOoJdEBoKfPDtK-QMyYIwl5bkxTbs9yXueKFNAcRSmTBKvQu9uKNCMjQxldwDY%3D)** to watch this urgent briefing now. If you own a home, have a portfolio of investment properties or rental units ... it's critical you take action now. Watch Dr. Weiss' video immediately, before the bottom truly falls out of this market. **[Watch the free video now.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a275384745364a41a6ea8f4923b07760&_e=ZrnbCKPAVam0v6gC9iU8iwP7rlGOKbPqe9Oqc8o_AV-c9gmpN00W3uMTxZbIvlJr3MygEKnwRuwLVFXSnBTjVFeJP1tJpyxFqO5zSsaFZcqtcv12avNx6MOg5R5V1YLW9WuQEUlT7KRvBtQe-vcy0V-hzlFgvPvdpMciZujS-GhkxCvs9GIhsBw8J0ynqPJobTBOQOLZKBgPvi3lwiLbulmFbnshy1HzycRbUoLwrYXQEUMzmgU1XN8Pb-3qsouPEunbQAl7RHP60yQ3sWlYzEz97k6sz1uhdJjp9eKA-Nw%3D)** Sincerely, |

Peter,

The National Rifle Association needs to hear from real American gun owners like YOU.

There are politicians in Washington who have no respect for the Constitution or the freedoms it enshrines. And they are on the attack emboldened. They are plotting to push the most restrictive gun control schemes ever on law-abiding Americans like you and me, even as they let while letting violent criminals run wild and free. The NRA is fighting back. We're ready to take the fight to them, but we can't do it without your help.

Taking a few minutes to fill out the **OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN REGISTRATION** will provide us with the data we need to best protect your Second Amendment rights. Your personalized survey link expires SOON, Friend.

**[Take the OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN REGISTRATION to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259103:66geAHGNU:m:1:3331421248:71CD9A602B6D576F6A9120F16D98D49F:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259103:66geAHGNU:m:1:3331421248:71CD9A602B6D576F6A9120F16D98D49F:r)

The National Rifle Association is the oldest civil rights organization in the country _and the ONLY one you can trust to protect your Constitutional gun rights._

Our team here at the NRA Headquarters is counting on your open and honest answers to our survey questions, Peter. It only takes a few minutes.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259103:66geAHGNU:m:1:3331421248:71CD9A602B6D576F6A9120F16D98D49F:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What happened to school choice in our state?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132780?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Ten years ago, amid much fanfare, Mississippi’s state legislature passed a law to allow Charter Schools. A decade later, what do we have to show for it? Not much, if we’re honest.**

So far, a mere eight Charter Schools have been approved across the entire state. Of the 450,000 or so children in public education in our state, a miniscule number are enrolled in Charter Schools.
---
|
---
**_Team MCPP celebrates School Choice week at the Capitol_**
| “Maybe that means there’s not much need for them?” some might suggest. Actually, there’s far greater demand for Charter Schools that there are places available.

Many families in Mississippi are happy with public education as it is – and not only those fortunate enough to live in ‘A’ rated school board districts such as Madison, De Soto or Rankin. The problem is those that are not satisfied. **For all the talk about School Choice in our state, right now there is very little dissatisfied moms and dads can do about it, unless they are prepared to opt out of public education altogether.**

Opting out is precisely what has been happening. Approximately 25,000 school children have been taken out of the system entirely and are home schooled. Well over 45,000 are now privately educated.

The precious few Charter Schools we are fortunate enough to have often do an extraordinary job. There just aren’t that many of them.

**We have seen pathetically little progress towards school choice in our state – and it is time to be honest as to why.**

**Mississippi only has a tiny number of Charter Schools not because parents do not want them, but because the administrative state in our state will not permit them.** The inappropriately named Charter School Authorizer Board has done a brilliant job of _not_ authorizing Charter Schools. **** By my count, eight out of ten applications have been rejected.

**School choice means much more than Charter Schools.** Giving moms and dads the freedom to decide what kind of education best suits their child might mean Charter Schools, but it could mean a micro school or using open enrollment to switch school districts.

Yet various attempts to allow open school enrollment between school districts died in committee in the state legislature, the chairman apparently unwilling to allow the issue further consideration. Why? A modest scheme that allows children with special needs a degree of choice has been watered down. Again, we need to ask why?

**Conservatives hold a super majority in our state, for goodness’ sake! So why is the Charter School Authorizer Board that conservatives appoint so unwilling to approve new schools?** Why does a state legislature with a conservative super majority seem so reluctant to even allow votes on open enrollment or Charter School Authorizer reform?

**If we are serious about School Choice in this state, we need to see the anti-School Choice agenda for what it is, whether it is declared or undeclared. **

“Too many vested interests don’t want change” I keep being told. Indeed. **There are plenty of people who earn a good living working in the education sector who don’t want School Choice.** There seem to be no shortage of expert ‘educationalists’ who recoil at the idea of letting moms & dads decide. But that does not mean they are right.

**The argument that giving parents more power leads to better education outcomes is irrefutable. The moral case for giving families control over their tax dollars is overwhelming. **
---
|
---
| We know that School Choice is opposed by the left-wing media. **So why would any conservative in our state want to make common cause with the hard left to prevent any serious extension of School Choice?**

It is good that we have a dedicated “School Choice week” in our state, but it is not enough. Nor should we console ourselves with the occasional nod given to School Choice. Instead, we need to take on those holding back our children’s education.

**Across many states in America, conservative leaders have created winning coalitions by promising to empower parents.** In Florida, where Gov De Santis has emerged as a presidential contender, he made his name extending School Choice for all. Betsy DeVos, who we will soon be hosting as a speaker here in Jackson, led the fight for more parent power across America. In states where conservatives have advanced over the past two years, such as Virginia and North Carolina, it has been by making School Choice a central pillar of their platform.

**Those that oppose School Choice in Mississippi might be many things, but they aren’t conservative.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=de627b0334&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| **_Ps. I aim to write two or three opinion articles each week. Here are various opinion articles published this week in Mississippi and across the USA with week:_**
* [**Profile of Douglas Carswell**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=690a8772ab&e=5703353baa) \- Clarion Ledger
* [**Will Congress raise the debt ceiling (again)?**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1fd4524ecc&e=5703353baa) – Magnolia Tribune, Northside Sun, Star-Herald, Columbia Progress, Choctaw Plaindealer, Enterprise Journal,
* [**Medicaid expansion won’t save rural hospitals**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bd01cb75a1&e=5703353baa) – The Center Square
* [**The true cost of solar power**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=93d238075b&e=5703353baa) – Real Clear Policy
* [**Tax cuts are better than a rebate**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1830b45a2c&e=5703353baa) – Northside Sun, Delta Democrat Times, Enterprise Journal, Daily Sentinel.

name: James Carville
subject: this struck a nerve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'll say it again:

**Trump and MAGA extremists pose the most serious threat to our democracy that I've ever seen.**
Donald Trump, _as president of the United States_ , sought to overturn the results of a fair and free election and incited an insurrection when it wasn't going his way. He's a criminal, and he should never hold office again.
But the con artist has another thing planned: **Trump is taking his campaign on the road and holding his FIRST 2024 campaign rally in South Carolina today.**
**We know MAGA Republicans are ready for a fight, and Trump will do everything he can to get back into the White House.**

We don't have a second to waste. I'm working with American Bridge to hold Republicans like Trump accountable and defeat them, but we need TOP Democrats' support NOW to build up our program strong enough to defeat him.
