name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s latest lie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll file a bill to outlaw stock ownership for members of Congress and their families — not some blind trust BS.
| Let me tell you about Josh Hawley’s latest lie.

This week he proposed a fake “ban on stock trading” for members of Congress that’s riddled with family and blind trust loopholes. **It’s just another campaign prop to help that fraud get reelected.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39276?t=6&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9) | [DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39276?t=7&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
---
The rest of us get thrown in jail for insider trading. **Politicians should too.**

That’s why when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll file a bill to outlaw stock ownership for members of Congress and their families. And not with some “blind” trust BS either — a real ban, with real consequences.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re ready to fight back against Hawley’s lies and finally hold our politicians accountable, please split a $10 donation between my grassroots campaign and Voter Protection Project today. I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so you know I mean it when I say any amount makes a huge impact.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39276?t=8&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39277?t=9&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39278?t=10&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39279?t=11&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39280?t=12&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39276?t=13&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9)
Here's my promise to you: Send me to Congress, and you'll never have to wonder if I'm fighting for everyday Americans. You’ll never wonder if I’m in office to enrich my own stock portfolio (I don't even have one!) — and any politician who gets in my way won't have to wonder either.

It’s time to take back our power from these corrupt elites and put working people in charge of our country.

Let’s get it done,

— Lucas
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6181%2E878179%2EM5sIk9).**

Within the “coming weeks” Meta, formerly known as Facebook, is set to reinstate former President Donald Trump’s Facebook and Instagram accounts. This news comes after years of fighting the ban with Trump’s legal team and supporters. It is expected that the reinstated accounts will be subject to certain restrictions and monitoring by Facebook for any violations of their terms of service. It remains to be seen how much freedom Donald Trump will have in his use of these platforms.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=950d5568b6054b41943fe5e4db891474&_e=SgirO-AUp1sKn2utCY2b6X-cFeXnNJ8Z2slmapiQq52aZIWBJbphSDQUqGN4L2iQ8Vj8dh2XXqi9PRRH4uqp64EM4WDaQ11CEo_CphuydDzFdu7QplarxSJbvRIGJrJtslJa5VuhNu0PefIcpBdBYl6zXlxAkdsdJK9ITk1h8xrqnPGkxCNJNduYyWWqKIm_T6wyWjhNgdv-XzQYWBRoSikuGo8zDoFdBA3rK6MR5x-BuEl-l2j3kU5LdLuTQlR9ILfquVOxI6jxSNm0SZCzVXg_S35gGQCe0OCimt3VgcNhB2S2Wt6E9tIHizM2wmGl8Oh3-m-U-aYjQAA8ZbQEq7soVD6y_gUYHSMVkoSrKFQRLZaOJHVIjb199lNmwefEjjE4DX8-gLrkbCMqG6kWQA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=950d5568b6054b41943fe5e4db891474&_e=SgirO-AUp1sKn2utCY2b6X-cFeXnNJ8Z2slmapiQq52aZIWBJbphSDQUqGN4L2iQ8Vj8dh2XXqi9PRRH4uqp64EM4WDaQ11CEo_CphuydDzFdu7QplarxSJbvRIGJrJtslJa5VuhNu0PefIcpBdBYl6zXlxAkdsdJK9ITk1h8xrqnPGkxCNJNduYyWWqKIm_T6wyWjhNgdv-XzQYWBRoSikuGo8zDoFdBA3rK6MR5x8hKZa5-icWFJTgqLFFKUUu4ThyPUfO2k7PyEnXcywSrtV1Y8k1i3zFK_t9CcQz2suYgwPS3OFDpdNBNlH17_0CLQKycqxFpLQpIP0fDtOka09aj02ABilE3FYQyl0Ce7vYun7OCTJzE2PmQA_UnR8ydKJUAEpHv-eR2VCum5vtNw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=950d5568b6054b41943fe5e4db891474&_e=SgirO-AUp1sKn2utCY2b6X-cFeXnNJ8Z2slmapiQq52aZIWBJbphSDQUqGN4L2iQ8Vj8dh2XXqi9PRRH4uqp64EM4WDaQ11CEo_CphuydDzFdu7QplarxSJbvRIGJrJtslJa5VuhNu0PefIcpBdBYl6zXlxAkdsdJK9ITk1h8xrqnPGkxCNJNduYyWWqKIm_T6wyWjhNgdv-XzQYWBRoSikuGo8zDoFdBA3rK6MR5x_Y7a2csv25oapM7UKi0GZPY6-C7C2AE555ZdWPY-gEiSRuP2AYXLn4wR2OoeVQKdCjGx-MzR5vpW-Y_LvkQy38GNTuadxJZqOgnd2nEwk1DmwNfV-bXrR64S5LzfJS3qxtUFqdAUkXrcfDiGmN64e9otgiPavxdlSLEUyydh7RtA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Coach
subject: 🛑 Vaccine Mandate Ended 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
What should we do now to rebuild our military?
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/da66adf0f0b48cb1/d3e5902caec7b97fc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Just before Christmas, Congress passed and Joe Biden signed into law the FY2023 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), which included a provision to end the military’s COVID-19 vaccine mandate.
The Pentagon has formally dropped the mandate – _a move that was long overdue_.
I am proud to have taken a stand on this issue and am celebrating this victory. No service member should ever have been terminated for refusing to take this vaccine.
Now, as we look forward, it’s vital that we implement new measures to rebuild our military. The latest data shows that our military is facing its greatest recruitment crisis since the switch to an all-volunteer force in 1973, putting our readiness and national security at risk.
**Do you have ideas on how we should rebuild our military?****
[Take a moment to share your thoughts here>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/da66adf0f0b48cb1/2069b712558fd054c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
\- Coach
---

body:
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...

Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that

There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2471514115cf42ba980069ab22684fa1&_e=nfcFNBAAwznqAUaHRI1fV4BygwN-gJokrEf13DtE3KESSZVxof0wBSQtKyvoe8p4WKfTm7ssJ055gNg6At19Onj6M5DqZkunovHJc907iY3FxUv_5eGaVDhSYCXVTQ5xFpCqe7Yl5Tb4xRBlI_STEZGOPj2BOPQsJs5JzvtaidRRJPmiDV-tW-IcoNTr0mIt5IZdCoiVrp3gxuRKRLNm7TZtFPJR2rpkhWvTNqPUutSwm1vNmivhdtFwnsgV9_ln8qS3n6RJ3MG6cAuynyTpDYhAna4Qq7rRA_E59JRpizA%3D) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2471514115cf42ba980069ab22684fa1&_e=nfcFNBAAwznqAUaHRI1fV4BygwN-gJokrEf13DtE3KESSZVxof0wBSQtKyvoe8p4WKfTm7ssJ055gNg6At19Onj6M5DqZkunovHJc907iY3FxUv_5eGaVDhSYCXVTQ5xFpCqe7Yl5Tb4xRBlI_STETG7zF0wSEbR281uCewSZacY-aw_4TcPnrCsLI0_VJY5kzC09_KoCrZYWmMHePokGplpXMmhIem4CF0NGKKJePNVpYRUctGiYGmu_gDVE740FhwsmUzfgAFTJLhZia1Jm1TFqVpMqShh3XZDzLJ4-To%3D)

Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the SEAL Survival Guide. The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... it's WHEN. A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Chairman Bernie Sticker | One Fair Wage: NY Kickoff! | Taking
on The ‘Other NRA’ | Sinema’s Challenger | 2024 Senate Outlook | Strategy
Inside the Party | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1011&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Folks! We’re releasing a new commemorative sticker celebrating Bernie
Sanders’ new position as Chairman of the Senate HELP Committee (Health,
Education, Labor, and Pensions).

This is a big deal and gives Bernie the power to expose corporate greed,
take on Big Pharma, and support workers and their unions!

As Chairman, Bernie will be taking the HELP Committee on the road and he
has big plans for this year, so Our Revolution is ramping up our
organizing to have his back.

Claim your Chairman Sanders sticker with a one-time donation of $10 — or
with a $5 recurring gift to invest in our work to carry out Bernie’s
vision.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8289?t=1012&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]CLAIM YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1013&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]National Organize-to-Win Broadcast this Monday for a
discussion with US Rep. Ro Khanna on the fight for One Fair Wage and
progressive strategy in Congress.

Then, we’ll hear from AZ Party Chair candidate Yolanda Bejarano and OR
Chair Larry Cohen on progressive organizing inside the Party, and Tara
Mosely on her run for Mayor of Akron, OH! It all kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 CT Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1016&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Founded by Bernie in 2016, Our Revolution is America’s largest
grassroots-funded political organizing group. In this new year, we’re
building on our work, expanding our grassroots organizing, and growing our
influence in the party.

With a Republican House, we’re pushing President Biden to deliver for
working people through executive action ahead of 2024. And, we’re backing
up Bernie as he takes on corporate power as Chair of the HELP Committee.

We’re also training our focus at the state and local level — where we have
amazing opportunities this year to elect powerful progressives and pass
life-changing legislation like higher wages for millions.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1017&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]We have a lot of exciting work planned for 2023, and we welcome you to
get engaged in our actions and become an Our Revolution member today.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1018&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

MEDICAL DEBT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1019&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

This issue of Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the
so-called “developed world" — and a big one that has been largely
neglected by politicians and the media.

Bernie put it into focus in his recent address on the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8290?t=1020&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]State of the
Working Class, noting that half of all bankruptcies in the U.S. stem from
medical debt and 38% of Americans are putting off healthcare because they
don’t want to go into debt.

We are compiling the stories of real people to bring pressure to bear on
this great healthcare injustice. Do you owe a hospital money for care you
needed but couldn't afford? If you are one of the many who owe money to a
hospital, please speak out and tell your story!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1021&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

ONE FAIR WAGE

A top issue for Our Revolution members is raising wages. That’s why we’re
partnering with One Fair Wage to pass legislation in 10 states this year
to eliminate the subminimum wage for tipped workers — and put it on the
ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024.

We will pass #OneFairWage because feeding your kids shouldn't depend on
the kindness of strangers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1022&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

On Monday, our team introduced the bill in New York — the first of our 10
states for 2023 — where we rallied and lobbied NY lawmakers to raise the
wage and not leave tipped workers behind!

Our coalition of workers and activists was joined by dozens of NY
lawmakers, folks like NY Sens. Gustavo Rivera and Robert Jackson who we
worked to help elect in November!

NY would be the 9th state to End the Subminimum Wage for tipped workers —
on Monday, we’ll launch the bill in Colorado, and on Feb. 8 do it again in
Illinois!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1023&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar spoke at the One Fair Wage event
about her experience in the restaurant industry. “I’ve come out of shifts
making less than the minimum wage,” she said. “Most workers at the
establishment have quit.”

We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service
industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — and
we’ll have your back!

Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the
forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in
the industry.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/tipped_wage_sv/?t=1024&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

THE ‘OTHER NRA’ vs. WORKERS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1025&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Not only are we organizing to pressure elected officials, but we’re also
going after the National Restaurant Association — because lobbyists
shouldn’t be able to use workers’ money to keep their wages low!

On Thursday, Our Revolution activists protested in NYC and Maryland
against the ‘Other NRA’, which the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8256?t=1026&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]New York Times recently exposed has
taken millions from low-wage workers and used it to fund lobbying against
wage increases.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1027&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

All elected officials must reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’ which has
used this scheme to stagnate the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr since
2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991!

US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our NO NRA Money pledge, and we
need his colleagues in Congress to follow suit!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1028&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1029&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Raising the Wage is popular — and necessary! Last year restaurant workers
won the fight to make Michigan the 8th state to end the subminimum wage
for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76% voted to raise the wage to $16.75.

This year we’re working with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage in
NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO, PR, and CA. We’ll also be collecting
signatures this year to put the measure on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in
2024.

Sign up to be part of our Raise the Wage Team chance to help millions of
workers in each of these 13 states win higher wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1030&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1031&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

With a Republican House, we must also push President Biden to deliver on
through the Power of the Pen.

Our Revolution’s Federal Action Team members zeroed in on the following
top three issues areas: Combat the Climate Crisis, Lower Healthcare Costs,
and Expand Worker Power.

Just some things Biden can do include giving sick leave to rail workers,
ensuring union rights for federal contractors, and closing tax loopholes
for the wealthy!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1032&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1033&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1034&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

SINEMA OFFICIALLY HAS A CHALLENGER!

Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is officially running against Kyrsten
Sinema for the US Senate in Arizona — and Our Revolution is all-in to make
sure the Senate has one less corporate villain.

For too long Sinema has used her power to help those who already have it
all — standing in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting
rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Gallego came directly at Sinema for repeatedly selling out working people,
saying, "The rich and the powerful, they don't need more advocates."

However, corporate Democratic leadership has not yet come out in support
of Gallego and has even refused to rule out endorsing Sinema! Which means
we have work to do.

With Sinema raking in big money rewarding her for her obstruction of
progress, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort to win. Donate
now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8291?t=1035&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]STOP SINEMA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1036&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

2024 SENATE RACES

Looking ahead to the 2024 Senate races, Our Revolution Executive Director
Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8292?t=1037&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]The Hill that “the progressive voting bloc in
the Senate is poised to become stronger.”

“Look, it’s a very tough map. It is going to be difficult for Democrats to
hold the majority,” Joseph explained, “but even if Democrats don’t do
well, progressives will, and we’ll have more influence.”

Democrats didn’t win the House in 2022, but the Congressional Progressive
Caucus got stronger, which shows that “economic populists, candidates who
put bread-and-butter issues at the center of their campaigns, can win,”
Joseph said

“I think that’s incredibly encouraging,” he added. “We need more Bernies
and Warrens — and Fettermans.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1038&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups
— we’re not skipping critical races in 2023.

Power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across America, and we
plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC, Philly,
Nashville, Dallas, and more.

Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to give us insight into
what’s happening in YOUR city or town, and help us make key endorsements!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1039&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1040&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1041&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Ahead of the DNC winter meeting in February, Our Revolution Board Chair
Larry Cohen penned an inside look at progressive work to transform the
Party for [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8293?t=1042&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]In These Times.

We have more progressive reformers inside the party than ever before, and
they’ll be re-submitting the resolution to get dark money out of primaries
at the meeting.

Disgraced crypto billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried funneled nearly $40M to
‘centrist’ Democrats in the primaries — and he was one of many. “Getting
this kind of corrupt corporate cash out of primaries is critical if we
want to elect grassroots challengers,” Larry said.

“For those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to
advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at
our peril,” Larry said.

“Without change within the Democratic Party, we won’t win the advances in
healthcare, childcare, workers’ rights, and climate change that are
desperately needed,” he explained. “Progressive party-building requires a
dedicated inside-outside strategy.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1043&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Today, Party elections in states across the country — with progressives on
the ballot!

Our activists are working to elect leaders like Brittany Ruland to Iowa
Party Chair, and Shasti Conrad — a former Bernie staffer and King County
(WA) Party Chair — is poised to become the next Washington State Party
Chair.

Yolanda Bejarano, candidate for Arizona Party Chair will join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1044&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]LIVE
Monday Night Call to discuss her results!

We’ll also find out the results next week from the California Party
Elections, where we endorsed people like Fatima Iqbal Zubair and Our
Revolution member Tim Cotrane on the progressive delegates slate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1045&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

The corporate wing is using any tactic it can to push back against the
growing power of progressives inside the Party.

If you’re a party member, delegate, precinct captain, or chair of your
local party — we’d love for you to help us further our progressive
strategy!

Sign up for our Party Transformation Team to connect with our broader
reform movement and help us organize the left of the party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1046&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1047&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1048&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

Join our National Organize-to-Win Broadcast this Monday for a discussion
with US Rep. Ro Khanna on the fight for One Fair Wage and progressive
strategy in Congress.

Then, we’ll hear from AZ Party Chair candidate Yolanda Bejarano and OR
Chair Larry Cohen on progressive organizing inside the Party, and Tara
Mosely on her run for Mayor of Akron, OH! It all kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 CT Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1049&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1050&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political
organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s mission in 2023 through our
4-Point Plan to Win:

Organize the Grassroots
Elect Progressive Champions
Transform the Dem Party
Fight for Progressive Issues

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1051&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Let’s head into 2023 as strong as possible. As a Movement Builder,
you’ll power the meaningful and strategic work we have planned for the
year ahead.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8288?t=1052&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1053&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Website |

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.hhmGA3&t=1007&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.sOL9bK&t=1008&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.n2Eefj&t=1009&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230128_1_1.uyoSEC&t=1010&akid=3942%2E5885482%2EFfTpNX ]GIVE ONCE

body:

I'll be direct, Peter. I'm reaching out to ask you to make a **[$5 donation](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCay2H3urQJSwidC2THjPGeptPZm9Kp8Rb5p86qSCkyzg_NVdWemEOeD222zUGhsQBBGXJvrQjy49AlyfamUu78vXLeg3W4A0ergmlMIwagsbGGmMMg92qY6ATJvf0h1-P07O9rI7aXYgM9F5RF3hF9h42-a91XuOTktkJ7M--iwnt44y_iDM344xjG1XcksP-_-ZRjFR2T3IvzUj6CE8dgdKgohL9QeGkpDhE8TvvKptEJwJU1jHnPh-PHKZ_v5OqA/3t8/Tpu5wp1TRjWFmBrUW2bTFA/h1/Us86uKPVwch08EPMWRKXhNOVQSn28NPbTrK7mctAtoA)** ahead of next week’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. To be completely transparent, we're pacing behind our fundraising target this month, so I want to briefly explain why your donation today would mean so much: The good news is that we've been making incredible headway in my first month in Congress. We've hired in-district staff and have already begun constituent casework. I was also just named to two major House committees (more on that soon). The bad news is I've been so focused on congressional duties that I've had less time to fundraise for my reelection effort. That's not ideal given how competitive this race will be in 2024. **Tallying strong fundraising numbers now will go a long way in warding off potential Republican challengers and may even help prevent national super PACs from attacking me. They'll see us as too formidable and not worth the expense. That's why this goal is so important:** **[Will you chip in a donation to help me meet the mark on my end-of-month goal? We're aiming to raise $30,000 before the deadline, and $5 from you would go a long way. clean_body: | | I'll be direct, Peter. I'm reaching out to ask you to make a ahead of next week’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. To be completely transparent, we're pacing behind our fundraising target this month, so I want to briefly explain why your donation today would mean so much: The good news is that we've been making incredible headway in my first month in Congress. We've hired in-district staff and have already begun constituent casework. I was also just named to two major House committees (more on that soon). The bad news is I've been so focused on congressional duties that I've had less time to fundraise for my reelection effort. That's not ideal given how competitive this race will be in 2024. Tallying strong fundraising numbers now will go a long way in warding off potential Republican challengers and may even help prevent national super PACs from attacking me. They'll see us as too formidable and not worth the expense. That's why this goal is so important: It means so much to me that our work is powered by folks like you who chip in on emails just like this one. It took a wave of grassroots support to overcome the well-funded, far-right attacks against us. As we head into the next election, we do so knowing that our efforts will hinge on your ongoing support. Thanks for your support, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: “We will IMPEACH BIDEN!!”
body:
She really means it.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafaf5ea4-e049-4165-b5d6-b31aa029516f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_She really said it. She really means it: "Impeach Joe Biden"_** _These words are being uttered by clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know, she'll work that part out later. _ **_The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T._** But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to *both sides* everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. _**For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. ****But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more.**_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfa15115-24b1-491f-943d-4e456af8d624/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** The result? **Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. **Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c9733c5-eaa7-47cc-8d7b-cd4a94643b69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4925b43-3c1d-468d-88ac-292ef3d9d87a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _The authoritarian Republican Party will do whatever it takes to destroy Joe Biden--sabotage our economy, do the bidding of foreign dictators, even attack our Capitol, as we saw two years ago January 6th. As President Biden approaches his State of the Union address and announcing his presidential reelection campaign, please j_ _oin us in backing President Joe Biden and ensuring Marjorie Taylor Greene's party isn't rewarded for betraying our country---_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c694a4b-2631-4fd3-b8ac-04ee0538e821/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teab74189-902f-4bc5-b9ac-586229f2208e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/impeachjoebiden2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfad8ae4f-ba2c-4465-97b5-20d06c7a85a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Tyre Nichols
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The only justice is change.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230128-3836-header&t=1&akid=3836%2E2526796%2EoyvjNS)
The effort to separate the officers who murdered Tyre Nichols from the system of policing that produced them is palpable.
Police killings in the U.S. reached a record high in 2022. That has only been rewarded with more funding at the expense of schools, hospitals, housing, & more.
Tyre Nichols should be alive. Charges alone aren’t justice. Change is.
At least 1,176 people were killed by law enforcement last year – a record.1 Billions of dollars in trainings, body cams, and reforms haven’t stopped it. In fact, it’s gotten worse.
We must grow out of this cycle together.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

* * *
1 - [Common Dreams](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16206?t=2&akid=3836%2E2526796%2EoyvjNS)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230128-3836-P_OTH_ANO_MIS&t=3&refcode2=3836_2526796_oyvjNS&akid=3836%2E2526796%2EoyvjNS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230128-3836-P_OTH_ANO_MIS&t=4&akid=3836%2E2526796%2EoyvjNS)**

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18874?t=1001&akid=2933%2E346206%2EkrtVsZ ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230128-2933-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2933_346206_krtVsZ&akid=2933%2E346206%2EkrtVsZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2933%2E346206%2EkrtVsZ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Freedom Corner Podcast - Brady Williamson
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| | | **STATE REPRESENTATIVE BRADY WILLIAMSON OFFICIALLY ANNOUNCES HIS REELECTION CAMPAIGN FOR THE MISSISSIPPI HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**
---
**Oxford, Mississippi (January 24, 2023) -** State Representative Brady Williamson releases the following statement announcing his reelection campaign to continue representing Mississippi’s 10th legislative district in the state House of Representatives. _“Today, I am proud to announce my candidacy for reelection as the Mississippi House of Representatives representative for District 10. As a servant, husband, father and small business owner, I understand the importance of protecting our state’s citizens both now and in the future._

_To that end, I am committed to abolishing Mississippi's state income tax without raising taxes elsewhere, defending the Constitution, and limiting the scope of government. I also want to make meaningful investments in law enforcement and our roads and infrastructure without raising taxes or taking away from other vital programs. _

_By making these investments, we can create jobs, attract businesses, and stimulate economic activity while ensuring public safety through effective policing. We will continue our work to create a more stable future for Mississippians and make our state a safe place to live and work. I will fight tirelessly on behalf of my constituents in District 10 to create a future where our state can thrive and flourish economically while maintaining safe communities. _

_I look forward to continuing my fight for Mississippi's families in the upcoming election.”_
| | |
---
In this weeks Freedom Corner Podcast, Brady Williamson talks about his freshman year in the Mississippi legislature and the lessons he's learned.
| | [Click Here for the Freedom Corner Podcast ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/db0UVNtiB-ocx6kbvDBG1w)

The 2024 elections are going to be tough for Democrats, so I am just going to tell it to you how it is: The DSCC is still $87,293 behind their end-of-month goal, **and falling short now could cost us our Senate majority.**

Trump-backed Republicans are raising MILLIONS to defeat us, and Senator McConnell is just **_two_** seats away from taking back control. We cannot miss the mark before our most important deadline so far this year.

**[Please, before this make-or-break public FEC deadline, I'm asking you to rush a $5 donation to defend our Senate majority!](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230128-ChuckSchumer-DeadlineApproachingRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230128-ChuckSchumer-DeadlineApproachingRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=9609%2E9716520%2EoK4zAY)**

I hate to admit this, but it has to be said: Our majority isn't guaranteed, and Republicans have a _serious advantage_ in their fight to take it back.

Pundits are now saying we have even MORE vulnerable seats to defend than last year, and like I said, Senator McConnell only needs to flip **_two_** of them. **If we fall short of our goal this month, we could slip behind right out of the gate -- and lose this fight before it even starts.**

Defending our majority, passing President Biden's bold agenda, and protecting our shared future from another Trump era all depend on hitting this end-of-month goal before the deadline -- **but we're still $87,293 short, and we’re missing your donation.**

**[Please, everything is riding on this: Will you pitch in to help Democrats defend the Senate? Our whole legislative agenda rests on us defending and expanding our razor-thin majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11468?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230128-ChuckSchumer-DeadlineApproachingRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230128-ChuckSchumer-DeadlineApproachingRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=9609%2E9716520%2EoK4zAY)**

Pundits are now saying we have even MORE vulnerable seats to defend than last year, and like I said, Senator McConnell only needs to flip two of them. If we fall short of our goal this month, we could slip behind right out of the gate -- and lose this fight before it even starts. Defending our majority, passing President Biden's bold agenda, and protecting our shared future from another Trump era all depend on hitting this end-of-month goal before the deadline -- but we're still $87,293 short, and we’re missing your donation. We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you, Chuck The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | ** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: American Action News
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7okmc7f9jmr3j3tali2hekq1aie29s5ikksh0s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjj6eo76cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zst9iofd9dvuthum7836bhthrj6j9hoh8678h57o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjj6eo76cph2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z92jlfstgosij84ottam4r0rj2gr15fj3ep8c6t0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77ec47a206ab42c2a612270822531add&_e=Z9NtCieIOLwCfHADtA6LnLZMtgxCioKc8d4YE65-kuU3UHVH6O7LZWHXZUIpyVAE4ozhqoq6rkXLfQF27HJm1HnKDLB9FJh-aHzzmIbp_fvjGQvNKxXT-XKMjvNxE_c0QnLneG6Pjjg5Q_u4HS2oja7LzLOOtlSAUz8T8hfxDEah1zVygH70d894HGKE8xLP1B4DvslV1IsB0JY1RVdDs8OkbXcHG3359seC43bYds3gKBe-RbgpM9rMowuJliJYEYJk4bc6KCjoXdziLe0IefUD2DT3sm-v_S0hwWLBeEFR7aF-l6vDK2C36F0qML7dtMGx4BYrlrfzC6FPnPDKIo1-CjxtEjvDdi5tuGjbfAIKqkrGZrD5jQarLA-VfiMv)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77ec47a206ab42c2a612270822531add&_e=Z9NtCieIOLwCfHADtA6LnLZMtgxCioKc8d4YE65-kuU3UHVH6O7LZWHXZUIpyVAE4ozhqoq6rkXLfQF27HJm1HnKDLB9FJh-aHzzmIbp_fvjGQvNKxXT-XKMjvNxE_c0QnLneG6Pjjg5Q_u4HS2oja7LzLOOtlSAUz8T8hfxDEah1zVygH70d894HGKE8xLP1B4DvslV1IsB0JY1RVdDs8OkbXcHG3359seC43bYds1d3yLkEV14gtMOBGkh69DC84NztMox98BUe4a7mZpLLQp661g_NZVw4eYTeFDcRsPu3uy514nG5ZKOkEQ9pZEQZFWC_ZnQJ4yxRoyp4ZMZDbXn8ZPaDnDhLyl4W9GWRkRdp_mRtySM5FK-svOWtQMv) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77ec47a206ab42c2a612270822531add&_e=Z9NtCieIOLwCfHADtA6LnLZMtgxCioKc8d4YE65-kuU3UHVH6O7LZWHXZUIpyVAE4ozhqoq6rkXLfQF27HJm1HnKDLB9FJh-aHzzmIbp_fvjGQvNKxXT-XKMjvNxE_c0QnLneG6Pjjg5Q_u4HS2oja7LzLOOtlSAUz8T8hfxDEah1zVygH70d894HGKE8xLP1B4DvslV1IsB0JY1RVdDs8OkbXcHG3359seC43bYds2yc_TBrzFIXpxC0yd0hsmhK35-zTnx8ztVrQ-RRbArb8CMhebgmlbChufca-LX1gxKw-fSoV5IQnbBZfpgnRqdwqLLDkczm9KtZ8J_LpIr1s9QcqsVULHXkvzrhCa5LehGxqMaA-1Vrr7D4E6G1LcH) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8ZLcGy91W58mtMfjjQaTQjYnsKJdqIxmnICThT4x_YoT9n5WbKe2NaheoQRrKKBD38Wi_iF5m7rMOYzeqPwye9cx3oSQI2MWk8GM84S2nffLunBY7DhScy8IrqLjjqGk2_7K8kuMEJl0fMnQkT9DN-o5Hvsds-MhSmmZ-92Y7oK847qviqUT7876VmLvPVzibMpMYOlRWmrxvH-U6y3uIPWowBWOOC0AGDkducmf4jg0UKHnFAPOilryxxkAaTcxwXfb5xhlPL8ks5t0GYEFXwI/3t8/xYu79dtTT0GRMkMN1iCrgQ/h0/4EizqzCgJmnDoJPcaIiSPGOO6QMvGlFFdFc92elJO2M) | | | Peter, WE HAVE BIG DREAMS FOR 2023 HERE AT THE COLLECTIVE PAC.
---
And that’s saying something. Here are some of our proudest accomplishments of 2022:
* Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot, 107 of whom won their races
* Powered 16 History-Makers to victory, including Maryland’s first Black governor and Los Angeles’ first Black female mayor
* Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls

We won’t quit until we elect as many Black progressive champions as possible and create a government that truly represents its people — full stop.

[AND WE CAN’T DO IT WITHOUT YOU, PETER. IF YOU’RE WITH US, RUSH $10 BEFORE OUR END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE ON TUESDAY AT MIDNIGHT AND HELP US REACH OUR $15K GOAL:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAbOJgON61N8mw_ztJshSh84JuLWeXkrAhfeKwvgfxENLKO6Hhu3pwf6Fd1VOuux9ay3YM2imkg8Z3LOqFi0xmDuGC3muIw7UWmpox4l_oRSrwcu99POJZ6J7sksxVjkugoJYI5ef46dsXtu47WTn-H3hwYXNm5j5Q3bCnX-A0VtdzE2fAg5AkwkUQ45uvhLn8gV3O-LJLNNStjgtHlEOmLh07NfOM6pU8n2kMUqxLpv4yeQ2HDse4bXwmPTFVT84ikAMZbq6xfT0TG7tGUxggT00upMT97dVogTdGZABHVSra-JQ-j8X3VlG-nVYkZ3VuPl82IhwkPMA0gXWQ-6LX_A/3t8/xYu79dtTT0GRMkMN1iCrgQ/h1/5k6G6aCKIseicFZ3F6pC1AZUxZB4PGoOlaTVEFxKWHg)

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, WE HAVE BIG DREAMS FOR 2023 HERE AT THE COLLECTIVE PAC. And that’s saying something. Here are some of our proudest accomplishments of 2022: Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot, 107 of whom won their races Powered 16 History-Makers to victory, including Maryland’s first Black governor and Los Angeles’ first Black female mayor Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls We won’t quit until we elect as many Black progressive champions as possible and create a government that truly represents its people — full stop. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. clean_body: Please read, we’ll keep this short. | | | | | In a moment we are going to share three reasons why you should donate to the DLCC today. Reason #1: State legislative races are historically overlooked and underfunded – despite the fact that your state legislators have the MOST impact on your daily life. Reason #2: State Democrats are facing crucial special elections in Pennsylvania in just 10 days that could determine if Democrats can control entire chambers this year – the stakes are sky-high in this competitive battleground state. Reason #3: State legislatures are the last line of defense against GOP attacks on voting rights, abortion access, our democracy, and so much more – but Democrats can't fight for us if we don't come together to invest early to elect them. And there’s never been a better time to donate – a generous group of donors have agreed to TRIPLE-MATCH every gift through our end-of-month deadline – so your donation will have THREE TIMES the impact to elect state Dems! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Katie Porter
subject: My whiteboard’s update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)
Derek,
You may know me as the woman who brings a whiteboard to congressional hearings to break down the math behind Wall Street’s corruption and Big Oil’s greed.
But as of just a few weeks ago, my whiteboard has an exciting update...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?amount=25&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)
**I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs.** I simply don’t look, live, or talk like most Members of Congress. Instead of attending swanky fundraisers with corporate lobbyists, **I’m one of a dozen Members of the House who rejects all contributions from federal lobbyists.** I’m a single mom of three school-aged kids who drives a minivan, and I’ve spent my career taking on special interests and delivering for working people. **And I’m running for the Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington.**
California has a unique system where the top two vote getters in the statewide primary (regardless of party) advance to the general. So while there are plenty of unknowns in this race, we do know we need to build a robust campaign that reaches Californians from all walks of life. **I want our campaign to show people how corporate CEOs and their friends in government are rigging the rules against working people, and then explain to voters how we’re going to fix it.**
As my former law professor, mentor, and friend Elizabeth Warren taught me: nobody gets elected alone. This isn’t BS—thousands of supporters chipping in $10 or $20 are the only reason I was able to win three competitive House races and compete with nearly ten million dollars in Republican super PAC spending this past year.
I’m asking you to join our team: **[Can you become a Founding Donor by making a $25 contribution today that will support my campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?amount=25&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $10 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F-el&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt) [Donate $25 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F-el&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt) [Donate $50 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F-el&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt) [Donate $100 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F-el&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt) [Donate $250 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F-el&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt) [Other amount ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-1?refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)
---
Thanks so much for considering, Derek. I’m excited to have you on our team.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF28_1_WAR_20230128_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=16704_3422442_6coipt&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=16704%2E3422442%2E6coipt)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

Time flies – we’re already coming up on the end of January.

To combat the onslaught of GOP money and close polling we saw in the days before Election Day, my campaign took on some debt. Since pundits moved our race to a toss-up, we had to. It worked. We won!

**That debt makes emails like this one _extremely_ important.** If we’re going to pay off that debt according to schedule, I need 49 people to donate to this email. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.

Peter — There’s no denying it: there are hard days as governor. There are days when you have to weigh choices and make tough decisions, and you can’t always make everyone happy. _But through it all, I know that I have the best team of supporters in North Carolina standing with me._ It’s folks like you who have made our administration so successful — and you've given us the opportunity to support Democrats across the state who will work with us to make even more progress. I deeply appreciate everything you’ve done for us. **[I need to ask for your support again right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918019/389523461/435245919?amount=5&refcode=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU5NTlmNy0yZjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JG-3HPny415UjLnFNLlF2R9mxO-cmz0R2ooUsc25irA=)** Over the last few weeks, we’ve seen a significant drop in our fundraising numbers. It’s enough to make my finance director nervous! We need to raise $10,000 to close our budget gap before the end of the month, and I know you can help. **[Please, give just $5, or anything that’s right for you, to get our team back on track>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918020/389523463/435245919?amount=5&refcode=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU5NTlmNy0yZjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JG-3HPny415UjLnFNLlF2R9mxO-cmz0R2ooUsc25irA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | ****[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918021/389523471/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39e959f7-2f9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWU5NTlmNy0yZjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JG-3HPny415UjLnFNLlF2R9mxO-cmz0R2ooUsc25irA=)****

clean_body: Can you help me again now? | Peter — There’s no denying it: there are hard days as governor. There are days when you have to weigh choices and make tough decisions, and you can’t always make everyone happy. But through it all, I know that I have the best team of supporters in North Carolina standing with me. It’s folks like you who have made our administration so successful — and you've given us the opportunity to support Democrats across the state who will work with us to make even more progress. I deeply appreciate everything you’ve done for us. = Over the last few weeks, we’ve seen a significant drop in our fundraising numbers. It’s enough to make my finance director nervous! We need to raise $10,000 to close our budget gap before the end of the month, and I know you can help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = = = Thank you, Roy = **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. And it’s going to be a mess: We can’t allow the Republican Party to gain a single inch in 2024. Your early support is critical in building the robust Democratic Party infrastructure we need to fight back and to continue our progress. Before Trump’s events, will you donate $7 to the DNC to fund the resources Democrats are relying on to compete and win in the coming years? Our majorities are too slim and the GOP’s plans are too dangerous for us to fall short. The race took an ugly turn as dark money groups got involved, bringing my character and values into question. Despite all that, we overcame with the support of people like you knocking on doors and sharing with your neighbors. But now, it is clear that CT-05 will again be a top target in 2023. My team and I set fundraising goals throughout 2023 to give us the resources necessary to continue representing this district with integrity. That’s why I am emailing, team. [**Can I count on you to become a founding donor of our re-election campaign by chipping in $20, $50, or even just $5 before January 31st?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918127/389523715/-395119092?refcode=E20141-20230128-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVmZjc1Yy0zMDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fb0v4QDSfw2H-6N4rOROqdzt42n8iddEZmaQjcDAT70=) | [Become a founding donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918128/389523716/-395119092?refcode=E20141-20230128-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVmZjc1Yy0zMDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fb0v4QDSfw2H-6N4rOROqdzt42n8iddEZmaQjcDAT70=)

Every day, I show up to fight for every single person in our district, from bringing back millions of dollars in federal funding for projects ranging from community safety to affordable housing to fighting for abortion access at the federal level.
Our communities deserve a representative who understands their values, and that is why I am running for re-election in 2024.
We overcame in 2022, and we will again in 2024. But first, we need to gather our resources to make sure we’re ready for whatever the upcoming election season throws us.
[**We are so close to reaching our first fundraising goal of the year – will you chip in to make sure we’re starting off 2023 on a positive note?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918129/389523717/-395119092?refcode=E20141-20230128-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGVmZjc1Yy0zMDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fb0v4QDSfw2H-6N4rOROqdzt42n8iddEZmaQjcDAT70=)
Thanks for your support,
Jahana Hayes

clean_body: | | Last year, CT-05 was one of the closest races in the country. The race took an ugly turn as dark money groups got involved, bringing my character and values into question. Despite all that, we overcame with the support of people like you knocking on doors and sharing with your neighbors. But now, it is clear that CT-05 will again be a top target in 2023. My team and I set fundraising goals throughout 2023 to give us the resources necessary to continue representing this district with integrity. That’s why I am emailing, team. = | = Every day, I show up to fight for every single person in our district, from bringing back millions of dollars in federal funding for projects ranging from community safety to affordable housing to fighting for abortion access at the federal level. Our communities deserve a representative who understands their values, and that is why I am running for re-election in 2024. We overcame in 2022, and we will again in 2024. But first, we need to gather our resources to make sure we’re ready for whatever the upcoming election season throws us. = Thanks for your support, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Congresswoman Pettersen
subject: update from DC for our core team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Hey friend, I wouldn’t have won the November election without your help and the efforts of our incredible grassroots team. So I wanted to take this opportunity to let you know I am already fighting hard for the values we campaigned on all year long. Three-and-a-half weeks into my term, I’m working with my colleagues to fight back against GOP attacks on abortion rights and protect Americans’ right to choose. I’m standing up for Medicare and Social Security — and will fight to stop any attempt by Republicans to hold these vital programs hostage by threatening to breach the debt ceiling. I’m fighting for paid leave, a minimum wage increase, and affordable health care for the millions of Americans who are struggling to make ends meet today. And I’m strategizing with my colleagues on how we can defend our democracy — fighting back against ANY attempt to undermine our elections or spread baseless conspiracy theories. [**Friend, we’ve got our first fundraising deadline of 2023 in three days, and we need to hit the ground running if we’re going to defend this seat and retake our majority next year. If you support our work, I’d love it if you could pitch in $20, or any amount that works for you, and help us reach our first big goal of 2023.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918708/389525759/-373509776?refcode=email_012823_updatefromdc&amount=20&amounts=5,20,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU0MzI3MS0zNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qsq6t9CR_5zu25NWy8UWRF5T_AqyScUO5k4Re31mU9k=) | | [DONATE $20 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57918709/389525760/-1145763526?refcode=email_012823_updatefromdc&amount=20&amounts=5,20,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU0MzI3MS0zNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qsq6t9CR_5zu25NWy8UWRF5T_AqyScUO5k4Re31mU9k=)
---
Thank you again for everything you’ve done for this team, and I can’t wait for the work we’re going to accomplish together in the coming years. I promise to work hard every day to make you proud.
Sincerely,
Brittany Pettersen
Congresswoman, Colorado’s 7th District
