| Team,

Have you ever heard an expression about hard work? Something like, practice makes perfect, or winning starts during conditioning?

Whatever the sport, hobby, or activity, I’m sure you can probably understand where I’m coming from. So you’ll understand when I say that winning in November 2024 starts this month.

That may sound crazy, but let me remind you that in 2021, we launched the earliest organizing effort we ever saw in Arizona with Project 15/30. The groundwork we laid a full year in advance – in calling out the AZ GOP’s audit, in organizing our communities, in supporting our Democratic candidates – it all played a crucial role in last year’s results.

**[Team, I know it seems early, but it’s absolutely crucial we start fundraising now for the next elections. We need to support Governor Hobbs, Attorney General Mayes, Secretary of State Fontes, and our Democrats in the AZ legislature and Congress. That requires staffing and resources. Can I count on you to help fill our $5,000 budget gap for this month by donating $5 today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sfmV_aGsPBOmuHixI4970RDxNlDO_tcrLgUNTfVQyqRTrAHjYfmio9WWi3YC38BZAUEgA0PWKK8gJu9L4axBSmOlQGplzowpS0ljO5GBS__8SMJ-8KKex0IskcGlOKD-uYstUhD-T_lbdHB9xdEjaEWZQ1g5PxUydxIgfxp0kk8ZhBFgf5YwydiPeRLNj1-waaLlkdHPz4Mhlh-6CM-MrWKKCDa_svyzXplzE8-c62dpUH570AN-N3aNsLdmed7OxVXYS6H71G0Qxqs-wCuOn6k6AjWtgz6GU7U0uuk8TipvAtjlT1pSW5Kb39CtPA-JuAOTqUhjTKvdiijdYTDsXjRLZTBJWV-vkEGJNQwdAuui/3t8/QjC1b5AxTHKUVKCJ_hJ5lA/h1/cMi9zM2U8TH9UXhsQSFKGrS9O6IfJPgXtG6jqO4YDSg)** [
DONATE ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sfmV_aGsPBOmuHixI4970RCJhw6yk3iSu_x4mmbrU7R8QL0TOLwXGY827ktvtYlgAosVZnrV7RvtP9mzwuY_CuNlA5UceKrZNSGckuJjUjS6wc6-jZHuBrQ5qefKlcFFLrxacayzPxPLiC_D37NIP8T9wlzUrkz9iqi7mjs7v6YeCrGClMl8JC5SbSvEfrRnTi4WW0BrKwy7QD4uEWX2t69Q5w49A9j0MRCxu3e7DLutQYfOrDz1U3rXL1G_pb6focslNwWiYWk9QDhCKx4l8sPUfSbwQtt8-VX2o0gHUPagtwqBTIeIdoKFOQ0FatzHR8OzxSartJFQbsJyu5vAACU0AG-fA9sTfNNsExrdSsQ3/3t8/QjC1b5AxTHKUVKCJ_hJ5lA/h2/gQF1eFAuYNQyHawB9jy5vS--d4Xk4t93z2oJIfWfs1E)
**_In case you’ve forgotten, none of our races were blowouts in 2022._**

Several of them went to recounts, and we had several more races just outside the recount limit. Add in that we are still just one seat in each chamber from taking control from Republicans, and there’s a lot on the line right now.

We need to crunch the election data, start recruitment for 2024 seats, and keep staffing up to hold Republicans accountable.

We can’t do that without our grassroots team stepping up.

**[Team, I know it seems like it’s too early, but if we want to win, we have to start that process right now. We have a $5,000 budget gap we need to fill by January 31. Can you donate now to help us close our gap and start prepping for turning Arizona completely blue?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sfmV_aGsPBOmuHixI4970RDa4c5aSlYirezqE7pZS98rMVAj8H4Plr19NlcTSkjAo40hG-VFdUJwqsxBfkmC9tcBuOKa8tVBW7nCQZ2PL3kIBODcQXnrcKtstI5CPDchtWfYGuDuebgnB3eiB9cBNfPHdsUJwoyINpphWYMaFP6T2DaAp5TJ0ToEH6YphTCbibLbpKtWY9ySxsq_i3FcTmaEs3VrGTIbMTaPregkEO4qohgX5ddPwTVWvZtWupxjsPOhe4vSoJxJ61tJausgMST8yelZtgcnQ0XCd2n3ev2B_K7ygZuEUoBBgSe-rnuUP3CPxZ-bCF3UKc8rpsk7_ek8QPfSLrFVIfxgcn6WYAMK/3t8/QjC1b5AxTHKUVKCJ_hJ5lA/h3/HwB82cp1lmsguDytW-dnAAWKFarcmza0DtcHAcmassA)**

clean_body: | | | Help us continue the momentum | | | Team, Have you ever heard an expression about hard work? Something like, practice makes perfect, or winning starts during conditioning? Whatever the sport, hobby, or activity, I’m sure you can probably understand where I’m coming from. So you’ll understand when I say that winning in November 2024 starts this month. That may sound crazy, but let me remind you that in 2021, we launched the earliest organizing effort we ever saw in Arizona with Project 15/30. The groundwork we laid a full year in advance – in calling out the AZ GOP’s audit, in organizing our communities, in supporting our Democratic candidates – it all played a crucial role in last year’s results. In case you’ve forgotten, none of our races were blowouts in 2022. Several of them went to recounts, and we had several more races just outside the recount limit. Add in that we are still just one seat in each chamber from taking control from Republicans, and there’s a lot on the line right now. We need to crunch the election data, start recruitment for 2024 seats, and keep staffing up to hold Republicans accountable. We can’t do that without our grassroots team stepping up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for stepping up, Charlie Fisher Executive Director AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . Already this year, we’ve started building our Democratic power in key chambers – flipping a Virginia state Senate seat in an ultra-competitive special election. But we can’t let our momentum die down now – we have three vital special election opportunities in Pennsylvania at the start of next month!
Our members are the core of this movement – committed Democrats who have taken action to support our incredible candidates as they face off against their Republican opponents in elections nationwide. **We want you by our side as we gear up for the next big fight.**
**By joining this grassroots team as an official member, you’re not only joining a growing community of over 7,000 activists across the country supporting state Democrats – you’re sending a powerful message to the GOP: Grassroots Democrats will never back down.**

clean_body: Thanks to this incredible outpouring of support, we only have 7,890 of our exclusive 2023 membership cards left! | | | | | We’re amazed! When we relaunched our Official 2023 Membership drive, we weren’t sure what to expect. Since then, 7,110 Democrats from your area have stepped up and claimed their official membership. But thanks to this incredible outpouring of support, we only have half of our exclusive 2023 Membership Cards left. We’re thrilled – every $10 gift from our members helps us commit the time, energy, and investment vital to competing against Republicans’ outsized spending in special elections. But we didn’t see your name on our official local member list, so we wanted to give you the opportunity to become a card-carrying member – before supplies run out! | 2023 Official Membership Record SUPPORTER: 2023 MEMBER STATUS:Inactive Your suggested matched donation:$10($30 impact!)** DEADLINE: Tuesday 11:59 PM If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Already this year, we’ve started building our Democratic power in key chambers – flipping a Virginia state Senate seat in an ultra-competitive special election. But we can’t let our momentum die down now – we have three vital special election opportunities in Pennsylvania at the start of next month! Our members are the core of this movement – committed Democrats who have taken action to support our incredible candidates as they face off against their Republican opponents in elections nationwide. We want you by our side as we gear up for the next big fight. _Let us know whether you share our and Senator Scott 's sense of optimism by answering the following poll:_

| | NEGOP Unicameral Update"2ND HOUSE ALERT"
NEGOP Legislative Update for Week ending January 27th, 2023 The legislature continues to drive forward. Republicans are forging a conservative slate on the core issues and doing it together! The Democrats continue to employ tactics to disrupt the progress of the session. However, the behavior of the most radical is helping us. Several Democrat Senators are working with conservatives on legislation to move the state forward as they realize the Loud Left have drifted too far away from common sense progress. A few Democrat Senators are treated with substandard attitudes by the radical wing of their party (just like they treat many of the Republicans). Bottomline, the radical and divisive nature of the Loud Left are helping the cause of the many. I am encouraging our Republican citizens to focus on the core values and agenda we are moving forward with. I recommend avoiding the “The Democrats are a Disaster” emphasis that the party has loved to campaign on for the last 20 years. A rut has developed to be more of a party of what we are against than what we are for. We are changing that culture. The government leaders of the Republican party have proactive solutions to big issues in 2023. Common sense legislation is moving forward. We will bring attention to the “bad bills” when necessary (when they have a chance to pass). However, we have positive legislation and policy that need the attention and support of the people NOW. We have put together our list of roughly 10% of the bills we are focusing on (80+ bills may seem like too many, but we have over 800 bills to consider and our party has numerous issues that matter to different citizens). The NEGOP has different subcommittees that have reviewed the bills. These subcommittees focus on the following: economy, public safety, education, government reform, agriculture, Constitutional rights, and election integrity (in no particular order). There are different planks under the purview of each subcommittee and those issues can be found in the NEGOP 2023 Legislative Plan or our party Platform. The subcommittees and their volunteers have given a significant amount of time in reviewing bills in their given area. Below is the list of the 10% of bills being watched (in addition to big movements on tax proposals). The list is fairly complete but we may add or delete a few bills as amendments/discussion continues. As the Political Director, I may add a few bills in the future to our list that are VERY IMPORTANT to our Senators. However, they will be cleared by committee members first as we desire to retain the “Ground Up” philosophy of this party going forward. We have noted the committee hearings that are scheduled (so far) next to the bills. Please monitor the bills of interest to you for a change/scheduling of a committee hearing. All bills need intelligent discussion at the committee hearings, not just the “Hot Topics” covered in the media. We will update the committee hearing times once a week for these bills, but do not have the resources for a daily update. It should be noted that there has been healthy, heated, but RESPECTFUL internal debate on several bills within the governing body of the party. The cause for this healthy debate is usually centered around two different values competing with each other. We will likely seek clarity to support specific bills from a larger body in March as we did with the Consumption Tax in January. Support for Consumption Tax legislation was passed by a count of 77-38 by the Central Body (5 “Neutral”) of the party. The overwhelming experience of local bodies hiking values and or levies is the disappointing experience for many (Lancaster received 30% adjustments this week) and is driving the desire for a new tax code as people are drowning in taxes. They desire a permanent long term solution in the Constitution to an annual problem. We anticipate more of these party votes on “unclear issues” in the future that have a variety of opinions from Republicans. A big step forward happened in Elkhorn where demonization of people with different opinions did not happen and people were allowed to evolve the debate forward on the issue and disagree with respect. Debate with respect is VERY HEALTHY. Election Integrity/Voter ID hearings will begin February 1 in the Government Committee. There are very different bills on VOTER ID that need to be compared and harmonized. Bills relating to secure ballots, domestically produced machines, and more are the subject of debate here and around the country. A petition to support election integrity bills was introduced this week. [You can sign that petition here](https://www.ne.gop/so/99ONrlZxa/c?w=C6CxTZXjAuvSdr1KJKYbBw_PT3WtK_tWZMBD6yWUx7o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvdVhoY2FUUjRUend6NmJ5UTciLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). Committee hearings will go all day starting next week as the “Half Day” hearing schedule comes to an end. On a negative note, our camping permit to support the people on the lawn of the Capitol in RV’s was denied (Just kidding). We encourage you to find family and friends in Lincoln to stay and testify. You are welcome to visit us at state headquarters (1610 N Street) during your visit. Please call first at (402)-475- 2122. This is your office and we appreciate your donations to support our efforts to educate/support/empower Republican citizens across the state. Let’s win on values! Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director

clean_body: For Your Situational Awareness NEGOP BILLS this NEXT WEEK : -LB374 Parents' Bill of Rights and Academic Transparency Act Hearing Jan 31st @1 | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"January 28, 2023 | | | | | | | For Your Situational Awareness NEGOP BILLS this NEXT WEEK :-LB374 Jan 31st @1:30pm -LB626 Feb 1st @1:30pm *Election Integrity/ Voter ID hearings begin Feb 1st NOW IS THE TIME TO FILL THE SEATS OF THE "2ND HOUSE"! | | | | | NEGOP Unicameral Update"2ND HOUSE ALERT" NEGOP Legislative Update for Week ending January 27th, 2023 The legislature continues to drive forward. Republicans are forging a conservative slate on the core issues and doing it together! The Democrats continue to employ tactics to disrupt the progress of the session. However, the behavior of the most radical is helping us. Several Democrat Senators are working with conservatives on legislation to move the state forward as they realize the Loud Left have drifted too far away from common sense progress. A few Democrat Senators are treated with substandard attitudes by the radical wing of their party (just like they treat many of the Republicans). Bottomline, the radical and divisive nature of the Loud Left are helping the cause of the many. I am encouraging our Republican citizens to focus on the core values and agenda we are moving forward with. I recommend avoiding the “The Democrats are a Disaster” emphasis that the party has loved to campaign on for the last 20 years. A rut has developed to be more of a party of what we are against than what we are for. We are changing that culture. The government leaders of the Republican party have proactive solutions to big issues in 2023. Common sense legislation is moving forward. We will bring attention to the “bad bills” when necessary (when they have a chance to pass). However, we have positive legislation and policy that need the attention and support of the people NOW. We have put together our list of roughly 10% of the bills we are focusing on (80+ bills may seem like too many, but we have over 800 bills to consider and our party has numerous issues that matter to different citizens). The NEGOP has different subcommittees that have reviewed the bills. These subcommittees focus on the following: economy, public safety, education, government reform, agriculture, Constitutional rights, and election integrity (in no particular order). There are different planks under the purview of each subcommittee and those issues can be found in the NEGOP 2023 Legislative Plan or our party Platform. The subcommittees and their volunteers have given a significant amount of time in reviewing bills in their given area. Below is the list of the 10% of bills being watched (in addition to big movements on tax proposals). The list is fairly complete but we may add or delete a few bills as amendments/discussion continues. As the Political Director, I may add a few bills in the future to our list that are VERY IMPORTANT to our Senators. However, they will be cleared by committee members first as we desire to retain the “Ground Up” philosophy of this party going forward. We have noted the committee hearings that are scheduled (so far) next to the bills. Please monitor the bills of interest to you for a change/scheduling of a committee hearing. All bills need intelligent discussion at the committee hearings, not just the “Hot Topics” covered in the media. We will update the committee hearing times once a week for these bills, but do not have the resources for a daily update. It should be noted that there has been healthy, heated, but RESPECTFUL internal debate on several bills within the governing body of the party. The cause for this healthy debate is usually centered around two different values competing with each other. We will likely seek clarity to support specific bills from a larger body in March as we did with the Consumption Tax in January. Support for Consumption Tax legislation was passed by a count of 77-38 by the Central Body (5 “Neutral”) of the party. The overwhelming experience of local bodies hiking values and or levies is the disappointing experience for many (Lancaster received 30% adjustments this week) and is driving the desire for a new tax code as people are drowning in taxes. They desire a permanent long term solution in the Constitution to an annual problem. We anticipate more of these party votes on “unclear issues” in the future that have a variety of opinions from Republicans. A big step forward happened in Elkhorn where demonization of people with different opinions did not happen and people were allowed to evolve the debate forward on the issue and disagree with respect. Debate with respect is VERY HEALTHY. Election Integrity/Voter ID hearings will begin February 1 in the Government Committee. There are very different bills on VOTER ID that need to be compared and harmonized. Bills relating to secure ballots, domestically produced machines, and more are the subject of debate here and around the country. A petition to support election integrity bills was introduced this week. . Committee hearings will go all day starting next week as the “Half Day” hearing schedule comes to an end. On a negative note, our camping permit to support the people on the lawn of the Capitol in RV’s was denied (Just kidding). We encourage you to find family and friends in Lincoln to stay and testify. You are welcome to visit us at state headquarters (1610 N Street) during your visit. Please call first at (402)-475- 2122. This is your office and we appreciate your donations to support our efforts to educate/support/empower Republican citizens across the state. Let’s win on values! Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director | | | | | The Legislative Bill List (In Numerical Bill Order)Bills highlighted in yellow have confirmed hearing times during the week of Jan 30-Feb 3 provisions of subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUr7tvWKakDDCFjYB5fxQCyHRNrM5TH1S9CxBbdJs9Ks5AhZBPR7I9GH6bHKoE4F7vkub_bP5afbw33Nm-f8-6zitiSY4OYnPHwlZPrbZtVgg1Lponc5J7VxlToEo2MYqfq540XvuXBc0Js_VGm7ladk%3D) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUiFOGinMVdfVvaOPPoMS2l-a1VUQA92kHZcnbqEgiJMXw4R3ge1SqdLgf5KOxcyF6TDbXnrGs2f87-RR9Go3FKEHIZn9hqjIrAoBwqhlSPBZwfYF20tV7NdMM_YxrnUfHa1JWIgMKHQXBN1sbITKg5s%3D) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUil4b2RtC0UmmNWmULeFNjgUoT9fngn4YPaXH6we_Nwkqo2uIx1iTpdbmetbXSQlVTGTJCh4SmGJESpp9N764lJjWyrfbGY54f4hnlhhz6-vdTKaKwJKu8z1uu1l9xNhPPA62Pny_1ix6HjDAgPQglA%3D)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUrPvdr_BGG-HBIotrVFzfdKilgjWgvT9_59MUh-e2IQW4kTbWLIMTy8wlzrwDqb_dLWy9VbmJmna5h67fL_8aU4ypiW-U8PMCwKcHP9v-zPW0R97M0LWZ43PcvLoakPinQ01kX3aLSpKcxNhhUv9RHY%3D) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUqIHuT2-Qan-uRl_d9OsUknIurIHrUxN0rdurtVBXhBTDIAlWP_aK4V15bBES_fmLsEdexWP0e0jrW2PfG93V54V5B-mylK5_6Kp1YTCmMBW4colOUMpK8ducNQYzeDcMgqZHRmJAySX09l30I8eOu0%3D) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUk0OJYkB00fNPJT8_cA3Req5Wje5xjHRWx7Pc90kJIXeo_Pjq9XfiKbfPsX55gWsEqqtVqMJ27cUOgZz98nhyHAxnj2i1wYd-PiPemV_5tgfKKHrwaFO3oREApXG6IaHF4z4J2zxnJRzRASmEd9trfk%3D) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=243e979a7d35497d911039471d358b88&_e=cw4rnazOnEAKbKi6ltgcTZAtz97WsLUD4xfitsFa3ahuk25si5uJSBDHZ3aVU5DRDsDQH9McW7tNBPc9uIg4bvtQDGkDsIOjRma8Ny_VDt9RuZvFJKqy8v9qPFuAreqIw3qwlklMqcfEktQRA1ecUt6N-iVkNOVFFSDSN13On0PQ3geMwqanNnR0xwdEEYkqA2otrx9Ltpta7GaELXPVjA9zzHbjjl7oU7fKZTsCg6WfHg89-WOs977o_5RtYtn9ph9dd8zKh1xXVeoPV_ApDOQ8SzMBiOTXnCm40bSVtG0%3D)

Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Quickly -- we want to bring you up to speed on the state of Sherrod’s race:
FIRST: The NRSC launched its first negative digital ads in Ohio targeting Sherrod.
THEN: Sherrod’s first opponent -- a wealthy state senator who ran in last year’s Ohio Senate contest -- jumped into our race.
NOW: The first end-of-month deadline is a few days away. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230128]
We told you -- it was only a matter of time before opponents and outside money started showing up in our race. This will be one of the most competitive races in the country. We can expect even more opponents to challenge Sherrod, even more money to be spent, and even more attack ads.
We need to be ready for anything, and that’s where you can help. Will you make a contribution before the deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230128]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod

| | Can we count on your support? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57920358/389530894/-712162911?sourceid=1048542&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibF4alv3FE9LTYKvrB1t8swPcaaX2PYWEB8airUObL0=&emci=8b29f5be-2c9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8011ac6-399f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, as the president of EMILY's List, I can tell you that this community's work to elect Democratic pro-choice women has never been more urgently needed than it is today — and we have an uphill climb ahead of us.

As we face the 2024 elections, Republicans hold a narrow five-seat majority in the House — which they're using to introduce draconian bills that attack reproductive rights. Democrats will be fighting to defend 23 of the 34 Senate seats up for grabs in the fight for Senate control. And Republican extremists are passing more and more restrictions on abortion access at the state level.

**EMILY's List was founded on the principle that early investments are the key to winning the toughest races. So as the first major fundraising deadline of the new election cycle quickly approaches, I'm counting on your help to reach our $200,000 End-of-Month goal. Every dollar matters as we gear up to help our candidates take on Republican extremists across the country and _win_ in 2023 and 2024.**

**[So please, will you donate now to help EMILY's List recruit, train and elect Democratic pro-choice women who can defend the future of our reproductive freedom?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57920365/389530901/-712162911?sourceid=1048542&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibF4alv3FE9LTYKvrB1t8swPcaaX2PYWEB8airUObL0=&emci=8b29f5be-2c9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8011ac6-399f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Controlling our bodies means we can control our futures, and that is a freedom that millions of people in this country do not have right now.

That's why we cannot let up. It's why we must start investing in crucial victories right now. It's why we can't afford to miss even a single goal. Too much is at stake — too many _lives_ are at stake — to give anti-choice Republicans even the slightest advantage.

**We can only reach this ambitious $200,000 monthly goal if supporters like you step up. Peter, I'm personally asking:**

**Will you make a donation right now to support Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight their hearts out to restore and protect reproductive rights nationwide?**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/First-Goal-of-the-Year](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57920366/389530902/-712162911?sourceid=1048542&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibF4alv3FE9LTYKvrB1t8swPcaaX2PYWEB8airUObL0=&emci=8b29f5be-2c9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8011ac6-399f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILY’s List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57920368/389530904/-712162911?sourceid=1048542&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibF4alv3FE9LTYKvrB1t8swPcaaX2PYWEB8airUObL0=&emci=8b29f5be-2c9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8011ac6-399f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57920369/389530905/1622596825?sourceid=1048542&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibF4alv3FE9LTYKvrB1t8swPcaaX2PYWEB8airUObL0=&emci=8b29f5be-2c9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8011ac6-399f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

subject: appalled

body:
---
| | I’m so disgusted, I can hardly type this email. [**Trump has officially called to "terminate" the Constitution so he can declare himself President.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57920889/389531108/1694452237?refcode=20230128_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzAxMWFjNi0zOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nf09yFcY6unDUh1IPC67v9LSjCy25XR35yCG7Z6z8cE=) I’m shocked. I’m appalled. And I’m going to make him rue the day he ever dared run for President again. [**_I’m asking for your immediate $15, because this twice impeached President just admitted he’s willing to rip our democracy to shreds in order to regain power. And the worst part is, he has MILLIONS in the bank to make it happen. I know defeating Trump and his MAGA cronies in Congress won’t be easy – or cheap – but there is too much on the line to risk his return to power. I’m humbly asking 2,991 Democrats to chip in any amount you can spare before my End of Week Deaddline. If we all pull together, I know we can put Donald Trump in his place, rescue our Democracy from the brink of destruction, and gather the necessary resources to defeat him once and for all. body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259335:JQeFyHG-N:m:1:3331421248:C5CAF6B6748F93C36E01397C66AED272:r)
Peter,

The radical leftwing media loves to create secular saints out of people who will promote their agenda.

Often, what you see on the TV isn't even real.

body:
Peter \-- I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign. Truly, it’s because of grassroots supporters like you that our Democrats outperformed all expectations in 2022. But here’s the thing, Peter: The GOP’s new House Majority is wasting no time attempting to reverse all of our progress and sabotage Democrats’ chance of taking back the House. [_**I’ll be blunt, Peter: My first End of Month Deadline of 2023 is just around the corner -- and I need today to be my best fundraising day yet. If I can’t raise another $3,536 before midnight, I won’t be able to help Democrats take back the House in this next election cycle. I’m asking you personally, Peter: Can you chip in $3 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57921297/389532605/-1810142053?refcode=20230128_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWMzMDJmNy0zZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CnETt5SF_hOde1X7fkBgz2zaqwsHrSm1bsguNBmjQY=) Peter, in just the past week, McCarthy’s new Majority has: \-- Pushed a far-right agenda that harms Social Security and Medicare

body:

In a move that shocked many, Newsmax has been deplatformed by DirecTV. This comes following another controversial move by DirecTV to deplatform OAN in April of 2022. The move by DirecTV has angered many Republicans, and Newsmax is looking to fight back by seeking a Congressional hearing about the alleged censorship by DirecTV, as they’ve never sought to remove liberal-leaning networks such as CNN, MNSBC, ABC, or other mainstream and liberal-leaning outlets.

Within the “coming weeks” Meta, formerly known as Facebook, is set to reinstate former President Donald Trump’s Facebook and Instagram accounts. This news comes after years of fighting the ban with Trump’s legal team and supporters. It is expected that the reinstated accounts will be subject to certain restrictions and monitoring by Facebook for any violations of their terms of service. It remains to be seen how much freedom Donald Trump will have in his use of these platforms.

| Peter,

Did you hear? Linda’s birthday is today!

Linda has always been a fierce advocate for our community and helped pass some of the most important legislation of our generation last year. In appreciation of her and her work, we wanted to show her she has strong grassroots support. body:
|
#
Peter — Is there anything we can say to convince you to contribute to Tammy’s campaign before our end-of-month deadline this Tuesday? What if we told you that pundits are already saying that the 2024 Senate map will be extremely challenging for Democrats — including Tammy’s seat here in Wisconsin? Or what if we mentioned that Senate Republicans and their Super PAC network will most definitely dump millions of dollars into battleground states to flip the majority in their favor? What if we mentioned how early investments from folks like you helped Tammy win by _double digits_ last time she was on that ballot, and that support will be vital again this time around? There’s nothing we can say that will be more convincing than the truth. And the truth is, **this grassroots team can handle anything so long as we can count on folks like you to keep up the fight.** So, we have one last question for you, Peter: **Will you add a contribution of any amount before Tammy’s first end-of-month deadline of the 2024 election cycle? **My name is Jennifer McClellan and I’m running to represent Virginia’s Fourth District in a special election that is just 24 days away.**

[**Virginians deserve a results-driven leader in Congress, and I’m ready to continue this fight in Washington. I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

But my work doesn’t stop here — because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district — but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive.

[**We need to raise $3,726 to hit today’s fundraising target, and I’d be really grateful if you could split a $10 donation between our special election campaign and Jennifer Wexton's. We’re counting on grassroots support to get us across the finish line, and that starts with you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57922099/389535694/1104955837?refcode=EM_FR_230127JMC_N_JM_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4ZDYyNy00MjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aV73zsSaxasWQG27dH3Tpwvd19CDFJeBU1XbS01jwQ=)

Let’s do this together,

Jennifer McClellan
Democratic Nominee for Virginia’s 4th district

subject: 11,779 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
that’s what made the difference, Peter

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57922100/389535697/227139380?refcode=20230128.1_GEU_1AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDE4ZDYyNy00MjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNKUQPSvIBL2Lzdz82XqR4iy9zvNi07YSXpW3-SuBWk=&emci=6bfc798a-209c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8418d627-429f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | [**_We’re rapidly approaching our first end-of-month deadline of 2023, and we’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 to help us keep Georgia blue. Will you pitch in now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57922101/389535698/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230128.1_GEU_1AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDE4ZDYyNy00MjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNKUQPSvIBL2Lzdz82XqR4iy9zvNi07YSXpW3-SuBWk=) **11,779 votes.**

That’s what flipped Georgia blue in a presidential election for the first time in nearly 30 years. That’s what made the difference between four more years of Donald Trump and electing President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris.

**After _months_ of grassroots organizing, communicating with Georgians, and driving historic levels of turnout, winning Georgia in 2020 all came down to 11,779 hard-fought votes.

_And we expect 2024 to be even tougher_.** [**_We need to get started now — not next month, not next year, now — on building the movement to elect a Democratic president and stop a MAGA Republican like Donald Trump from returning to the White House.

If you’re with us, will you rush an urgent donation before the end-of-month deadline? _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57922102/389535699/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230128.1_GEU_1AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDE4ZDYyNy00MjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNKUQPSvIBL2Lzdz82XqR4iy9zvNi07YSXpW3-SuBWk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From warning of the national security threat posed by the CCP to discussing the classified documents found at Biden's private office, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. This week, Mike was appointed to serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), House Foreign Relations Committee (HFAC), and House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (HPSCI) during the 118th Congress.
Read more 👇
---
---
**Waltz at Work in Florida**
---
Mike was honored to speak with fellow Volusia patriots last Sunday with Jim Jordan and Cory Mills. Thanks to our amazing grassroots Republicans, Florida helped take back the House! Let's get to work to make the rest of America more like Florida!
---
---
---
**In the News**
---
**WALTZ ON THE CCP** Last week, Mike joined [The Jedburgh Podcast](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5a1b46e57d774ec8ae4efdef0acd009f&_e=26DwJGEyDx24WzCu8QvCrz1Xi7QCzjpoLgHKbnu0qChZkMKc9vyo3DcMnixyY3C_H5ZZWJhj3vyb_vwTXBkW70QMDvUUD28Z3ljY13AwyQgRxJVa86jYfnaxe8yKYi-BcT3sgGN9ilgiMbvsRFAlszKCvMls5p-WALAc0ynvwxICVB2gqXNGrLVRgrvPmsX-iS90tbcY9YlPNdSQitY7zNc6HH25mX3L0LGP8n06hz3Ca_yih-ydUIiwQgq-CFZqiPa_hnFt07OhcuhwIH6IY756mfs_jTfYHr2TQCI6OxZLATThwuAn4bp_cVzRGZBW5J86HUEUj2JbuDdoQP7oAH78xpaR9Jt-lZsjn1TySo89tdX9SoE671nowBRDeu7K) to discuss what it means to balance power and statesmanship, break down the 2022 election cycle, and the national security threat posed by the CCP. _"We need to wake up to that fact. Everybody out there, when you see Made In China, put it down. Made In America is not just a jobs issue. It’s now a national security issue. It is our money that is funding their military buildup." _

**WALTZ ON WHITE HOUSE DEFLECTION** Last weekend, Mike joined [Fox Business' Varney & Co.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5a1b46e57d774ec8ae4efdef0acd009f&_e=26DwJGEyDx24WzCu8QvCry3Fe1Cus6D5pBeFPjg2brQ4LOGXwDKKXRTJK8fqtV8xOG3EH-NuXa0bdkFUrHNRrbYRz_6Yri-3qOBoTu7gH3ayU7toyLvFDJNVMC_KQh-3RWv0ftB2nQMRKFc8ypSNkuRGClgo_ADNrYGv9K-6h_wUMf-iHmi7rau0MyXdHMebjpnP_l52Pax54RBZ-dQPutBzkOsR75SiIEwkZAElke0GTinHqd4nbMcQHnqwAJ-dIU6mDF0_T6DtlcL0RCJsI8Is0RF8JZ9cmASEAAho_8BzIhBgnCsmT-717rTb65H4os9kvI31jDYYQC4fELCPjw%3D%3D) to discuss the White House's refusal to address Biden's classified documents. _"Democrats have set a very dangerous precedent for themselves, referring people for criminal prosecution who refuse Congressional subpoenas. The White House can’t continue deflecting on Biden’s classified documents. Congress will get to the bottom of this." _

At the end of the day, it's not the number of documents that matters, it's the quality of the documents."_

Ilhan Omar's removal from the Foreign Affairs Committee. _"Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East_ _. It's a democracy, they share our values. Those of us who support those values deserve to be on the Foreign Affairs Committee, but antisemitism has no place on it"_

clean_body: | | | | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From warning of the national security threat posed by the CCP to discussing the classified documents found at Biden's private office, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. This week, Mike was appointed to serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), House Foreign Relations Committee (HFAC), and House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (HPSCI) during the 118th Congress. Read more 👇 Waltz at Work in Florida Mike was honored to speak with fellow Volusia patriots last Sunday with Jim Jordan and Cory Mills. Thanks to our amazing grassroots Republicans, Florida helped take back the House! Let's get to work to make the rest of America more like Florida! In the News WALTZ ON THE CCP Last week, Mike joined to discuss what it means to balance power and statesmanship, break down the 2022 election cycle, and the national security threat posed by the CCP. "We need to wake up to that fact. Everybody out there, when you see Made In China, put it down. Made In America is not just a jobs issue. It’s now a national security issue. It is our money that is funding their military buildup." Listen to the entire podcast . WALTZ ON WHITE HOUSE DEFLECTION Last weekend, Mike joined to discuss the White House's refusal to address Biden's classified documents. "Democrats have set a very dangerous precedent for themselves, referring people for criminal prosecution who refuse Congressional subpoenas. The White House can’t continue deflecting on Biden’s classified documents. Congress will get to the bottom of this." Watch the entire segment . WALTZ ON DOUBLE STANDARDS FOR BIDEN Then on Tuesday, Mike joined to weigh on the classified documents drama after former Vice President Mike Pence finds documents in his Indiana home. "I find it disturbing that the White House has not confirmed that a review from the intelligence committee is even happening . At the end of the day, it's not the number of documents that matters, it's the quality of the documents." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON THE FOREIGN AFFAIRS COMMITTEE On Friday, Mike finished out the week by joining to discuss Rep. Ilhan Omar's removal from the Foreign Affairs Committee. "Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East . It's a democracy, they share our values. Those of us who support those values deserve to be on the Foreign Affairs Committee, but antisemitism has no place on it" Watch the entire clip . Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors! | | | | | | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Today, I will officially be the **FIRST** Republican presidential candidate to campaign in the two early primary states of New Hampshire and South Carolina.
No other candidate is working _this early_ to win every last vote and save America from Biden’s destruction.

clean_body: I’m heading to the first primary state of New Hampshire. | | | Friend, Today, I will officially be the FIRST Republican presidential candidate to campaign in the two early primary states of New Hampshire and South Carolina. No other candidate is working this early to win every last vote and save America from Biden’s destruction. But that’s what has to be done. If we want to compete with George Soros’ money machine and beat the Democrats at their own game of ballot harvesting, we need to get to work RIGHT NOW. That’s why our campaign set an ambitious fundraising goal in honor of today’s visit to the FIRST primary states of the 2024 election. | | It’s been two years since Biden and Kamala seized control of the White House – and our country has gone down the tubes. ...Our border has been left wide open for murderers, drug dealers, human traffickers, and God only knows what else. ...Our economy is being hammered by skyrocketing inflation and out-of-control spending bills. ...Our cities are threatened by soaring crime brought on by liberal DAs who release criminals from jail with just a slap on the wrist. ...Our basic constitutional rights like free speech are being ripped to shreds. ...Our FBI has been weaponized to go after the White House’s political enemies like something you’d see out of a third world country. But with your help, that’s all about to change... ...You will soon remember what it’s like for America to win again! Thank you, | Donald J. [ On Thursday, California Rep. Adam Schiff announced that he is running for the U.S. Senate seat currently held by Sen. Dianne Feinstein. Schiff, a Democrat, tweeted, “We’re in the fight of our lives—a fight I’m ready to lead as California’s next U.S. Senator.” Schiff joins Katie Porter, D-Calif., who announced she is running for the seat earlier this month. Dianne Feinstein has not yet announced her retirement but is widely expected to and Democrats are ready to fill her seat in order to shore up power. See Schiff’s announcement below: ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2kqmrtmjochg3a64dmpih86otloqqaanrksq3i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjim2p74c5h2bs)

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Help us hit our first goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, We have our first goal of the year coming up. Hitting our first fundraising goal of the year translates directly to winning elections. When we raise resources early, we have more power to make long term strategic decisions about how and where to invest in electing Democrats. [**Our goal of $3,000 in grassroots donations by the end of the month is achievable if we all pitch in and make this happen. Donate today and help us start 2023 off on the right foot.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57923667/389543370/1643342139?refcode=230128-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjkwMjliYy00ZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Ep_B2-NW-MQj7iU4gStj4778YQWB595_mynHjv6sk=) Democrats were able to deliver big on a national scale last year. In 2022, federal Democrats made critical investments in infrastructure, healthcare, and democratic reforms that helped make our country stronger. We can bring that same enthusiasm and success to Indiana by building a movement that invests in strong candidates in critical races. [**By electing Democrats at the local level this year, we can build the bench and set ourselves up for future success at the state and federal level. But we need your help to do it. Chip in today and help make 2023 a Blue year in Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57923668/389543371/1643342139?refcode=230128-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjkwMjliYy00ZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Ep_B2-NW-MQj7iU4gStj4778YQWB595_mynHjv6sk=) Thanks,

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Why did a GOP mega donor give $1 million to the Moderate PAC?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, have you
seen this headline from The Intercept?

[1]The Intercept: CENTRIST DEMOCRATIC PAC’S SOLE FUNDER IS A REPUBLICAN
MEGADONOR
A GOP mega-donor and 🤑billionaire🤑 gave Moderate PAC $1,000,000 to stop us
from recruiting the next slate of progressive primary challengers like
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Summer Lee. 😱

So now we’re officially sounding the alarm. 🚨
Peter, we need
your help to fight back against Moderate PAC and their GOP mega-donor —
who also happens to be a billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230128-27274&t=1001&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now? If enough
people step up and support us in this critical moment, we can be prepared
for what we know is coming this cycle — an onslaught of attacks and
millions spent against us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230128-27274&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn ]Contribute $3

Moderate PAC is coming after us because they’re threatened by our success.
We recruited and helped elect AOC, Summer Lee, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman and in just a few short years have completely shifted the
conversation about what’s politically possible in Washington.

But Moderate PAC plans to raise and spend $20 million against us and our
candidates. Because our own fundraising has been steadily declining, we’re
counting on you to help us counter this obscene amount of money they’re
spending against us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230128-27274&t=1021&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn ]We will never stop fighting for a Democratic Party that actually works
for 99%, not corporations. Please make your best gift right now.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230128-27274-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27274_1203867_vxWMNn&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27274%2E1203867%2EvxWMNn

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
| **Peter, we noticed you hadn’t submitted a response for our urgent George Santos poll — _so we’re extending our deadline for just 6 more hours!_**

_George Santos is a pathetic LIAR:_ ❌ He lied about where he went to college
❌ He lied about working on Wall Street
**_❌ He lied about his entire identity while running for office_**

body:
Since we launched this campaign, almost 40,000 people have contributed to help elect Ruben Gallego to the United States Senate.
#

We’ve got some great news for you, Peter. Check it out.
**Good news:** Since we launched this campaign, almost 40,000 people have contributed to help elect Ruben Gallego to the United States Senate. An absolutely extraordinary number.
**Great news:** That number includes almost 10,000 Arizonans who have joined our campaign since day one. That’s the foundation for a winning campaign.
**The Best News:** We are very close to reaching our January fundraising goals even though our average donation is less than $30. We can’t share that goal number publicly just yet — it’d probably shock a lot of people — but if enough people chip-in before our deadline, we’ll get there.

Our work at HER Time is about so much more than just electing more women and taking back the House. _Sure, that’s a huge part of it_ — but we also work year-round on our legislative priorities: paid family leave, making revenge porn a federal crime, restoring reproductive rights, and more. These things are not only possible, but they’re also necessary in order to make this country better and safer for women everywhere. We need this team on our side to make progress on these issues, especially ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up this Tuesday. name: Democracy Watch, NDRC
subject: attacks on voting rights are escalating ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
but the NDRC is fighting back – and we’re getting results!
|
---

**The first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023 is almost here —[ _don’t wait until it’s too late to make your first donation_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57924871/389547611/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20230128.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxZTI0ZTFjLTU3OWYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yACVLUtGsK08omVdrQB-qBDMasTzRLwtcLzgejfLd8A=) to support the NDRC’s democracy-saving work.**

**We’ll start with the bad news, team:_Attacks on voting rights are escalating._** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57924872/389547612/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20230128.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxZTI0ZTFjLTU3OWYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yACVLUtGsK08omVdrQB-qBDMasTzRLwtcLzgejfLd8A=)**
---
**First** , after the 2020 election, more than a dozen states passed new voter suppression laws.

**Then** , the Supreme Court continued putting key provisions of the Voting Rights Act in jeopardy.

**Now** , _more_ states are considering passing restrictions on voting in 2023.

**And** , with the power of the House majority, Republicans can work to undermine voting rights at the national level as well.
**But here’s the good news: The NDRC is fighting back – _and we’re getting results!_**

Our grassroots movement helped Democrats win key governors’ and new state legislative majorities in 2022.
[Help win more victories for voting rights: Donate today](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57924873/389547613/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20230128.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxZTI0ZTFjLTU3OWYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yACVLUtGsK08omVdrQB-qBDMasTzRLwtcLzgejfLd8A=)
---
**Now, Democrats in states like Michigan and Minnesota are planning to use their power to _expand_ access to voting!**

As Attorney General Eric Holder said, **“Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation.”** _He’s right!_
[**_The NDRC’s work to defend voting rights is powered by supporters like you. Will you help us defeat Republican attacks on voting rights with a donation of any amount today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57924874/389547614/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20230128.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxZTI0ZTFjLTU3OWYtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yACVLUtGsK08omVdrQB-qBDMasTzRLwtcLzgejfLd8A=)

Then , the Supreme Court continued putting key provisions of the Voting Rights Act in jeopardy. Now , more states are considering passing restrictions on voting in 2023. And , with the power of the House majority, Republicans can work to undermine voting rights at the national level as well. But here’s the good news: The NDRC is fighting back – and we’re getting results! Our grassroots movement helped Democrats win key governors’ and new state legislative majorities in 2022. = Now, Democrats in states like Michigan and Minnesota are planning to use their power to expand access to voting! The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Peter, last year, you helped me make history as the first Black lawmaker ever to be re-elected to New York’s attorney general office. But this year, our work begins anew.

While on the campaign trail, I vowed to continue to fight fearlessly and tirelessly for progress – and now, I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting to work. I’m going toe to toe with some of the most powerful and corrupt forces in our nation, but I can only win these fights with your continued support.

**That’s why my team set a goal to get 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before January ends, but so far only 159 supporters have stepped up. So I have to ask:

[Will you rush whatever you can spare to activate your 2023 Team James Membership to help me protect our fundamental rights and power our fight for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57925971/389550214/-1577261820?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk948-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUzZjc3ZC01ZjlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNMYhO8od8gopDcqXYWCcZ9K-1r6ZpmdXKUQ1xR3w00=)**

Peter, here’s where our fight for progress stands in 2023: _Millions_ of Americans are _still_ without access to safe reproductive health care, the rights and safety of LGBTQ+ people are still being threatened, and tragically, approximately _40,000_ Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends.

**The time for action is now.** That’s why, when I won re-election as your attorney general, I vowed to do everything in my power to continue pushing the needle for progress forward – but together, we can spark even more change. So I’m humbly asking:

clean_body: | | | = Peter, last year, you helped me make history as the first Black lawmaker ever to be re-elected to New York’s attorney general office. But this year, our work begins anew. While on the campaign trail, I vowed to continue to fight fearlessly and tirelessly for progress – and now, I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting to work. I’m going toe to toe with some of the most powerful and corrupt forces in our nation, but I can only win these fights with your continued support. That’s why my team set a goal to get 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before January ends, but so far only 159 supporters have stepped up. So I have to ask: = = | | = Peter, here’s where our fight for progress stands in 2023: Millions of Americans are still without access to safe reproductive health care, the rights and safety of LGBTQ+ people are still being threatened, and tragically, approximately 40,000 Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends. The time for action is now. That’s why, when I won re-election as your attorney general, I vowed to do everything in my power to continue pushing the needle for progress forward – but together, we can spark even more change. So I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being someone I can count on this year. Friend, until last year, Roe v. Wade __ upheld the constitutional right to an abortion, empowering Americans to make their own choices about their bodies and futures.
But the Supreme Court ruling on Dobbs overturned 50 years of precedent, striking down Roe and ending the constitutional right to abortion in America.

**Republicans have spent years stacking the courts and passing extreme legislation in states across the country to get to this point – and they won't stop now. A national abortion ban is next.**

GOP-controlled state legislatures moved quickly to limit abortion rights following the Supreme Court's barbaric decision. Thirteen states with "trigger laws" have banned abortion altogether. But let me be clear: Overturning Roe was never the end goal. Republicans want to make abortion illegal everywhere.

I am appalled. In all my time working as a reproductive rights advocate, including my tenure as president of Planned Parenthood, I have _never_ seen a more dire moment for the future of our fundamental rights in America.

It will take all of us to fight back. But we need your support today to do what we need to do to prevent extreme anti-abortion Republicans from gaining more power.
